description: Wagner's Safflower Seed - Cardinals love it, most squirrels don’t. Wagner's Safflower Seed is a great way to attract the birds you want - Cardinals, Chickadees, Titmice, Grosbeaks - and discourage the "feeder hogs", like Grackles and Starlings, that keep them away. And best of all, squirrels generally don’t like the bitter taste so they will stay away as well. If you have unwanted birds and squirrels crowding out your songbirds we recommend gradually filling your feeder with Wagner’s Safflower Seed for a period of time, then gradually mixing in your favorite Wagner’s Premium Wild Bird Food. Wagner’s Safflower Seed is truly a premium, high value seed not found in ordinary blends. So give the Cardinals their favorite seed and keep the pests away at the same time, with Wagner’s Safflower Seed. Trust your backyard birds to the experts at Wagner’s.

description:
About this item

You will receive (1) 40-pound bag with your order.
This high-quality general feeding blend is made with cut corn, wheat, red milo, white millet, black oil sunflower seeds and red millet.
Can be used all year round for wild bird feeding to attract a wide variety of birds.

Non-GMO Assurance: Our sunflower seeds are Non-GMO, ensuring they're free from genetic modifications and any associated harmful effects, making them a responsible choice for both birds and the environment.
Natural Authenticity: Because our seeds are non-GMO, you may find some field debris and twigs, a testament to their natural origin and lack of artificial processing.
Chemical-Free Feeding: We guarantee that our sunflower seeds are free from harmful chemicals, providing birds with a safe and natural food source while safeguarding the ecosystem.
Irresistible Bird Magnet: Birds of all sizes and species are drawn to our high-quality Black Oil Sunflower Seeds, making them an ideal choice for bird watchers and conservationists.
Protein-Packed: These sunflower seeds are packed with high-quality protein, ensuring your feathered visitors receive the essential nutrients they need to thrive and flourish.

description: Wagner's Nyjer Seed is the absolute favorite of Finches, such as the American Goldfinch, House Finch, Purple Finch, Pine Siskin and other small songbirds. This tiny delicacy is used in Finch feeders which have smaller holes and tiny perches - perfect for the Finches but discouraging to larger birds. Wagner’s Nyjer Seed is the perfect choice for nurturing Finches with its high fat and protein content. Sometimes referred to as "black gold," nyjer seed may seem more expensive than some premium blends, it actually lasts longer as it packs an incredible 150,000 seeds per pound and the seeds create no waste, no mess, no growth and more visits to your feeder. Fill your Finch feeder with Wagner’s Nyjer Seed and enjoy the antics of these beautiful and sociable birds in your backyard. Trust your backyard birds to the experts at Wagner’s.

description:
Black oil sunflower seeds are the number one choice for feeding wild birds and attract the widest range of bird species than any other seed or wild bird food.
Preferred by a wide variety of feeder birds, black oil sunflower seeds are a favorite of cardinals, finches, nuthatches, and many more. These seeds can be used in the following feeder types: tube, hopper, window, fly-through, platform, or tray feeders.
The freshest, locally blended, and bagged daily in Delano, Minnesota using the highest quality products. 100% of the black oil sunflower seeds we use in our blends come from local family farms in South Dakota who practice ethical farming methods.
Black oil sunflower seeds attract: House Sparrow, House Finch, Purple Finch, Black-Capped Chickadee, Dark-Eyed Junco, Northern Cardinal, Blue Jay, White-Breasted Nuthatch, Red-Breasted Nuthatch, Common Redpoll, Rose-Breasted Grosbeak, Pine Grosbeak, Evening Grosbeak, Mourning Dove, Downy Woodpecker, Rock Dove(Pigeon), White Crowned Sparrow, Gray Jay(Whiskey Jack), Grackle, Tufted Titmouse, Grey Catbird, Bushtit, Pine Siskins, Black-Billed Magpies
Ingredients: 100% Black Oil Sunflower from South Dakota

description:
About this item

Premium Quality: 50 Pound Sunflower Chips offer medium-sized, shelled sunflower seeds of the highest quality, ensuring a nutritious and delicious treat for your feathered friends.
Nutrient-Rich: Packed with essential nutrients, these hulled sunflower chips are a wholesome source of energy for wild birds. Keep your backyard visitors healthy and happy with this nutrient-rich bird seed option.
No Waste: Say goodbye to messy bird seed leftovers! Our Sunflower Chips are conveniently shelled, minimizing waste and providing a clean feeding experience for both birds and birdwatchers.
Attracts a Variety of Birds: Enjoy a diverse array of bird species in your backyard. CountryMax Sunflower Chips are a magnet for various birds, making your birdwatching experience even more exciting.
Suitable for All Seasons: Whether it's winter or summer, CountryMax Sunflower Chips are a versatile bird seed option for outside feeders that can be enjoyed by feathered friends throughout the year.

description:
About this item

Non-GMO Assurance: Our sunflower seeds are Non-GMO, ensuring they're free from genetic modifications and any associated harmful effects, making them a responsible choice for both birds and the environment.
Natural Authenticity: Because our seeds are non-GMO, you may find some field debris and twigs, a testament to their natural origin and lack of artificial processing.
Chemical-Free Feeding: We guarantee that our sunflower seeds are free from harmful chemicals, providing birds with a safe and natural food source while safeguarding the ecosystem.
Irresistible Bird Magnet: Birds of all sizes and species are drawn to our high-quality Black Oil Sunflower Seeds, making them an ideal choice for bird watchers and conservationists.
Protein-Packed: These sunflower seeds are packed with high-quality protein, ensuring your feathered visitors receive the essential nutrients they need to thrive and flourish.

description:
About this item

You will receive (1) 25-pound bag with your order.
This bird food is formulated with 100% genuine black oil sunflower seeds.
Black oil sunflower seeds have a high fat and protein content, providing a filling and lasting source of energy.
Its nutrient content and thin shell make black oil sunflower desirable to almost every bird.
It can be fed on its own or blended with other wild bird seed and is best used with a large port tube feeder, hopper feeder or platform feeder.
These seeds can be stored in a cool, dry place for long periods of time which makes them an excellent option for bulk purchases and long-term storage without any loss in quality.
Attracts: American Gold Finches, Evening Grosbeaks, Downy Woodpeckers, Hairy Woodpeckers, Red-bellied Woodpeckers, Rose-breasted Grosbeaks, House Finches, Purple Finches, Black-capped Chickadees, Dark-eyed Juncos, Red-breasted Nuthatches, White-breasted Nuthatches, Northern Cardinals, Steller’s Jays, Blue Jays, Tufted Titmice, House Sparrows, Common Redpolls, Mourning Doves, Northern Flickers

description:
About this item

Attracts a Variety of Birds: Safflower seeds are known to attract a diverse range of wild birds, including cardinals, chickadees, titmice, and more. Many bird enthusiasts appreciate safflower seeds for the variety of species they can attract to backyard feeders.
High in Nutrition: Safflower seeds are a nutritious option for wild birds, providing essential nutrients such as fats and proteins. These nutrients are crucial for the health and well-being of birds, especially during colder months when food sources may be scarce.
Shell Thickness Deters Pests: Safflower seeds have a thicker shell compared to some other birdseed types. This can be beneficial in deterring pests and preventing the seeds from sprouting and creating unwanted plants around your feeding area.
Ideal for Selective Birds: Some bird species, like cardinals, are known to favor safflower seeds over other options. If you want to attract specific types of birds to your backyard, offering safflower seeds can be a strategic choice.
Unappealing to Squirrels: One notable advantage of safflower seeds is that they are less attractive to squirrels compared to other birdseed varieties. This can help minimize issues with squirrels raiding bird feeders and allows birds to enjoy the seeds without competition.

description:
About this item

WIDE VARIETY OF BIRDS - Great for Cardinals, Chickadees, Titmice, Doves, Purple Finch, White-Breasted Nuthatch, Woodpeckers and Grosbeaks
HEALTHY BIRD FOOD – Safflower is loaded with fat, protein and oil. Grown in USA 100%. 16.18% Crude Protein, 38.45% Fat, 25.7% Fiber. Great nutrition and birds love to eat them. Safflower seeds are great to incorporate into your bird feeders and watch as beautiful array of birds that will flock to your back or front yard.
SQUIREEL DETERRENT - If you have trouble with squirrels eating your bird food this is a great choice as squirrels do not enjoy safflower seed. Safflower seeds are known for their bitterness and squirrels would prefer not to eat them. This is a great way to keep your feeders full and the squirrels away.
LARGE QUANTITY – 50 pound bag is large quantity for consistent refilling of bird feeders or spreading out on the ground.
BIRD CONSUMPTION- This is bird food quality and not suitable for human consumption.

description:
Check out the latest additions to the JCS Wildlife line of Small Seed Cylinder products!

Finch Favorite

The JCs Wildlife Finch Favorite Premium Seed Cylinder is the first of its kind! It is a thistle seed cylinder made to attract primarily finches to your backyard! Thistle seeds do not germinate, decreasing the mess and waste hitting your lawn and without inviting unwanted pests or ingrown plants. This high-oil cylinder provides a much needed boost of protein in a bird's diet and helps give them more energy all year round. Proudly made in the USA by birders for birders!

Golden Safflower

Golden Safflower, also known as NutraSaff, is a safflower hybrid specifically developed for bird feeding to have a thinner hull (40% thinner) and higher levels of oil (15% more), protein (25% more), and fat (30% more) than traditional white safflower. It's easier and healthier for your birds to eat, and studies show that birds prefer it 2 to 1 over traditional safflower! It also tends to deter squirrels, grackles, and starlings with its bitter taste. Attracts: Cardinals, Chickadees, Nuthatches, Grosbeaks, Titmice and others.

Small Cylinder Variety 6-Pack!

Bird seed made by birders! JCs Wildlife seed cylinders are made with high quality ingredients sourced and made in the USA! If you're not sure which type of cylinder to purchase, grab our variety 6-pack and let your birds make the choice! This 6-pack comes with one each of our Bugs, Nuts & Berries, No Mess, No Waste Fruit Blend, Finch Favorite, Golden Safflower, Wild Bird Blend and Woodpecker Blend small seed cylinders. Guaranteed to have your backyard birds coming back for more!

JCs Wildlife Seed Cylinders are simple to use!

JCs Wildlife Seed Cylinder Feeder

Bird lovers use seed cylinders for many reasons, but sheer ease of use is certainly a big factor. A simple steel rod with a base and perch ring. Then a loop on top for easy hanging and an accessory hook underneath. Our seed cylinders have a 1/2-inch hole in the middle that runs from top to bottom. Simply remove the cylinder from the package, slide it onto the feeder and you're good to go! The extra hook on the bottom can be used to hang a suet cage or just about any other small bird feeder.

JCs Wildlife Seed Cylinder Feeder with Poly Weather Cover

Want to protect your cylinder from the elements? Try adding a JCs Wildlife Weather Cover. Our covers come in 2 sizes - medium (12"X10"X3") and large (12"X12"X3") and a variety of colors. The seeds in the cylinder are "glued" together with gelatin. They hold up very well for a lengthy amount of time while being out in the elements. But if you want to keep the cylinder dry or your birds out of the rain while they dine, adding this Poly Weather Cover is a great choice.

JCs Wildlife Seed Cylinder Feeder with Metal Rain Guard

Yet another option for keeping your seed cylinder and dining birds dry is adding our Metal Rain Guard. The Rain Guard comes in red and green with a nice looking scalloped design. There are 3 sizes available - 9.5", 16" and 22.5". This durable guard features a sturdy hook from which to hang your feeder. It is also treated with a protective powder-coat paint to ensure the colors don't fade in the elements. It will look great in your backyard!

Seed Cylinder offerings will attract a wide variety of birds to your yard! Here are just a few.

Northern Cardinal

Northern Cardinals enjoy many different types of seeds and nuts. They will readily come to a cylinder which contains black oil sunflower, sunflower chips, peanuts, safflower and more. They will eat fruit too - like raisins and cranberries.

Downy Woodpecker

The Downy Woodpecker is likely the most frequent visitor to any seed cylinder feeder. While this bird will eat a varied assortment of seeds and nuts, peanuts are a big favorite. As you can see from our comparison chart, all JCs Wildlife cylinders contain peanuts!

Rose-breasted Grosbeak

The Rose-Breasted Grosbeak is a migratory bird in North America. They spend their summers in Canada and the northern US states, from Maine to North Dakota. They are a delight to have at your feeder and will readily eat safflower and black oil sunflower.

Red-bellied Woodpecker

The Red-bellied Woodpecker, much like it's little cousin the Downy, enjoys peanuts as much as a kid at a baseball game! Several of our cylinder options also contain "diced tree nuts" in addition to peanuts. The Woodpecker Blend would be perfect for Mr. Red-Belly!

JCs Wildlife Small Seed Cylinders

Our private-label line of cylinders come in 5 different varieties, each containing plenty of seeds, nuts and/or berries that your birds will love. The All Season Blend is for year-round use. Bugs, Nuts and Berries incorporates dried mealworms into the mix. No Mess, No Waste contains no seed shells or hulls. Wild Bird Blend is simply a good, all-around option for attracting many different types of birds. Finally, Woodpecker Blend is chocked full of nuts to appeal to woodpeckers.

Multi-Packs available!

Have a lot of hungry birds in your yard? Want to save some money by purchasing in bulk? All 5 of our cylinder varieties in both large and small sizes come in multi-packs. Choose from 2, 4 or 6-pack options. Cylinders are easy to store and will remain fresh for weeks. You may also want to try a cylinder in both your front and back yard. We are pleased to offer several options to our customers. And don't forget - all JCs Wildlife Cylinders are made in the USA!

Packed with the ingredients your birds will love!

Unique to our Bugs, Nuts and Berries Cylinder - dried mealworms. "Yum-yum", say your backyard birds! Don't worry, the worms are dead and dried. Most bird species native to the US eat bugs and feed their young a consistent diet of insects. Bluebirds especially, while not necessarily a "feeder bird", may come to this seed cylinder to dine on some delicious mealworms. Changing your cylinder varieties up from time to time may allow you to see different species. Or find a favorite and stick with it - the choice is yours!

2 different sizes, 5 different varieties!

Our large Woodpecker Blend Seed Cylinder comes in at a whopping 5lbs and measures 7.5" tall X 6" wide. Both the large and small cylinders fit nicely on the JCs Wildlife Cylinder Feeder. Hungry woodpeckers will enjoy this large cylinder for weeks. An advantage of using a large cylinder is that once you place it in your feeder, you shouldn't have to worry about replacing it for quite some time. Going on vacation and want to keep you birds happy while you're away? Try one of our large cylinders!

All Season Blend
Bugs, Nuts & Berries
No Mess, No Waste Fruit Blend
Wild Bird Blend
Woodpecker Blend

features: ["Finch millet & White Millet: Also known as German Finch Millet, it is a favorite with Goldfinch, House Finch, and purple Finches. Millet provides essential nutrition to backyard birds such as vitamin B, protein, and it is packed with magnesium. White millet is also lived by Mourning Doves and Painted Buntings.", "Sunflower Hearts: Sunflower seed without the shells are a superior source of fat, fiber, protein, and vitamins, providing excellent nutrition for all birds. Even small birds like the finch can feed on this type of sunflower being that there is no hard shell to break open. This conserves their energy, especially important in the cold winter months. Also, the consumer is not paying for the weight of sunflower shells which will only be discarded by the birds.", "Valley Farms Super Deluxe wild bird food blend is the ultimate in bird feeding as it contains a complete variety of seed, nuts and even dried fruits to meet the preferences of almost any songbird in your area.", "As the name implies, this is a well-balanced super blend of premium wild bird seed. Super Deluxe attracts most any kind of song bird across North America. Each of our finely selected seeds are vacuum cleaned in an extremely clean facility, made in the USA and guaranteed for freshness and quality."]
name: Super Deluxe Wild Bird Food (15 LBS)

description:
About this item

You will receive (1) 20-pound bag with your order.
This bird seed is formulated with 100% safflower seeds.
Safflower seeds are favored for their high energy content, small size, and thin hull, and as a bonus, they don't leave behind shells and are disliked by squirrels.
It can be fed on its own or blended with other wild bird seed and is best used with a large port tube feeder, hopper feeder or platform feeder.
Packaged in a barrier bag, sealed air tight and CO2 flushed to preserve optimal freshness. Packaging is in the process of being updated and may vary.
Attracts: Northern Cardinals, Black-capped Chickadees, Dark-eyed Juncos, White-breasted Nuthatches, Downy Woodpeckers, Hairy Woodpeckers, Northern Flickers, House Finches, Mourning Doves.

description:
Proudly MADE IN THE USA!
Bugs, Nuts & Fruit Bell
Bugs, Nuts & Fruit A delectable feast for an amazing variety of wild birds. This formula is sure to attract your favorite feathered friends
Practical & Easy to Use
Easily hang with the included loop or a Mr. Bird Seed Bell hanger or a similar bell hanger.
Long Lasting!
Generous size means these bells will last for days and days, no more running out to refill the feeders constantly. It can't be kicked all over the place like lose seed can. Large size lasts a long time and attracts loads of birds. No waste, no mess, never melt.
A Healthy Diet for your Feathered Friends
An amazing variety of birds visit these Seed Bells! In addition to the regular feeder birds such as;

Cardinals
Chickadees
Woodpeckers
Nuthatches
Finches
Titmice

We have reports of various Warblers, Wrens, Kinglets, Mockingbirds, and even Bluebirds eating these Seed Bells. What makes this product special is the formula; a fantastic blend of mealworms, pecans, sunflower hearts, raisins and cranberries. BUG APPETIT! You will see the quality and the dramatic results in your own yard.

No Waste or Mess
Quality ingredients means these seed bells attract birds much more quickly than suet and without the problem of melting in the summer heat. Great for year-round bird feeding

description: Introducing our premium Non-GMO Black Oil Sunflower Seeds, a natural and nutritious choice for bird enthusiasts and conservationists. Sourced from small farms committed to sustainability, these sunflower seeds offer a guilt-free and environmentally-friendly way to attract a diverse range of bird species to your outdoor space. Our seeds are free from harmful chemicals, providing a safe and wholesome feeding option for your feathered friends. Due to our non-GMO nature, our seeds may contain some field debris and twigs, showcasing their authenticity and purity. description:
About this item

🌻Sunflower Kernels are the best grain to attract many varieties of colorful finches and other outdoor pet birds.
🌻Sunflower hearts are sunflower seeds without the husk (a kind of outer shell). Birds would discard the husk from the sunflower seed leaving waste. Hence they are a 'No Waste' and 'No Mess' Seed as they’re a great way to avoid the mess and waste associated with hulled seeds.
🌻These are no grow seeds as they do not germinate, keeping your backyard clean without pesky pests or ingrown plants without any chemical treatment.
🌻Packed with high protein and fat, they are a real year round favourite and full of nutrition. Providing birds with the correct food will keep their feathers, skin and beaks in a healthy condition.
🌻They attract a variety of species including Cardinals, Chickadees, Blue tits, Mourning doves, Siskins, Goldfinches, woodpeckers, Great tits, Greenfinches, House sparrows, Long-tailed tits, Nuthatches, Robins, Starlings

Attracts Diverse Species: Ideal for attracting a broad spectrum of wild birds, including cardinals, chickadees, nuthatches, finches, and more, transforming your backyard into a lively birdwatching haven.
High-Fat Winter Bird Seed: Packed with high levels of protein, fat, and other essential nutrients, these seeds help to support the health and vitality of wild birds, particularly during the critical periods of migration and breeding.
Versatile and Easy to Use: Suitable for all types of bird feeders, such as tube, hopper, and platform feeders. The seeds' convenient size makes them accessible to both small and large bird species.
Transform your outdoor space into a sanctuary for wild birds with CountryMax Backyard Seeds Black Oil Sunflower Food. Enjoy the beauty and joy of birdwatching while contributing to the well-being of your feathered visitors.

description:
Proudly MADE IN THE USA!
All Season Fruit & Nut Bell
A gorgeous fruit and nut bell sure to attract your favorite feathered friends
Practical & Easy to Use
Easily hang with the included loop or a Mr. Bird Seed Bell hanger or a similar bell hanger.
Long Lasting!
Generous size means these bells will last for days and days, no more running out to refill the feeders constantly. It can't be kicked all over the place like lose seed can. Large size lasts a long time and attracts loads of birds. No waste, no mess, never melt.
A Healthy Diet for your Feathered Friends
An amazing variety of birds visit these Seed Bells! In addition to the regular feeder birds such as;

Cardinals
Chickadees
Woodpeckers
Nuthatches
Finches
Titmice

We have reports of various Warblers, Wrens, Kinglets, Mockingbirds, and even Bluebirds eating these Seed Bells. What makes this product special is the formula; a fantastic blend of safflower, pecans, peanuts, sunflower hearts, black oil sunflower, golden raisins, papaya, and apple! You will see the quality and the dramatic results in your own yard.

No Waste or Mess
Quality ingredients means these seed bells attract birds much more quickly than suet and without the problem of melting in the summer heat. Great for year-round bird feeding

description:
About this item

No Mess, No Waste: Say goodbye to the hassle of cleaning up birdseed shells and scattered debris. With our shelled sunflower chips, you're providing your birds with 100% edible food, reducing waste and keeping your feeding area clean and tidy.
Premium Nutrition for Your Feathered Friends: Our Sunflower Chips are meticulously selected to offer the finest, high-quality nutrition to your backyard birds. These medium-sized, shelled sunflower chips are a favorite among a wide variety of bird species, making them the perfect choice for your bird feeders.
Packed with Essential Nutrients: Our Sunflower Chips are a nutritional powerhouse, rich in proteins, healthy fats, and essential vitamins and minerals. They provide the energy your birds need to thrive throughout the year, whether during breeding season, migration, or cold winter months.
Versatile Feeding Option: These sunflower chips are highly versatile and can be used in a range of feeders, including hopper, platform, and tube feeders. You'll have the flexibility to cater to the preferences of different bird species that visit your backyard.
Attract a Variety of Bird Species: From colorful finches and cardinals to energetic chickadees and woodpeckers, our Sunflower Chips are an irresistible treat for a wide array of wild birds. Watch your backyard come alive with vibrant avian visitors.

description:
About this item

Exotic and highly nutritious oil-rich seeds, which are great for year -round feeding. No growth seed to prevent unwanted growth in your yard.
Nyjer seed is one of the best single grain seed for attracting many varieties of finches and songbirds. These are No grow seed to prevent unwanted growth in your yard. They are heat-treated at optimum termperature without use of any chemical maintaining the taste and nutrition of the seeds.
High quality seeds processed in a USDA & BRC-GS approved facility that lasts longer as it packs an incredible 150,000 seeds per pound.
Comes with highly durable empty mesh sock feeders (Pack of 3 socks), that requires no assembly and is re-usable. Just fill in the sock with nyjer seeds and hang to feed the birds
Convenient Pack of 3 empty mesh socks for Multiple feeding areas or can be used as a back-up. The Sock can be washed and refilled for multiple uses. Each sock comes with a secured drawstring and measures 12 inches in height which can hold upto 20 Oz of Nyjer seed per sock

description: Birds Love It Squirrels Don't! That's because our special blend is packed with natural ingredients that birds love and squirrels don't! Birds love our premium white safflower seeds, but squirrels find them bitter tasting. Plus we added spicy chili peppers. Birds don't have the spicy sensation when eating chili peppers, but mammals do. Chili peppers are a great source of vitamins and nutrition for birds, but squirrels and other mammals that do not like the fiery hot taste soon learn to look elsewhere for food. It may take some time to work, but visible signs that it's working will include squirrels spending less time at the feeder, rubbing their faces and mouths and shaking their heads. We recommend an alternative feeding station for squirrels nearby to help distract them from your bird feeders.

This high-quality, all-purpose blend is a step up from our All Season Blend, formulated with top ingredients including white millet, red milo, wheat, black oil sunflower, red millet and peanuts.

description:
About this item

IT'S SIMPLE. No fillers. No additives. No GMO. And, no peanuts! Our blends are Certified Peanut Free by a third party accredited lab and are stored, blended & packaged in our purpose-built peanut & tree nut free facility.
IT'S PERSONAL. We understand first hand what it's like navigating life with a peanut allergy, and it's why we do what we do. Because we wholeheartedly believe that everyone should be able to feed the birds worry and peanut free. And, now you can.
QUALITY COUNTS. We start with only the finest quality seeds that backyard birds truly love. Then we blend and package them in small batches, this means fresher seeds and less dust (the birds really can tell the difference).
ALL THE BIRDS! This is the only blend you'll need to attract ALL of the following wild birds to your yard; Finches (Goldfinch, House & Purple), Pine Siskins, Chickadees, Cardinals, Nuthatches, Grosbeaks, Juncos, Sparrows, Mourning Doves, Blue Jays and more.
100% COMPOSTABLE PACKAGING. Our packaging keeps the seed secure in its peanut free state and is kind to the environment. OUTER BAG: FSC certified paper suitable for home composting. It can also be recycled with regular paper recycling. INNER BAG: 100% plant based and BPI Certified Compostable under ASTM D6400 (where municipal or industrial facilities exist).

  • ALL THE BIRDS! This is the only blend you'll need to attract ALL of the following wild birds to your yard; Finches (Goldfinch, House & Purple), Pine Siskins, Chickadees, Cardinals, Nuthatches, Grosbeaks, Juncos, Sparrows, Mourning Doves, Blue Jays and more.
  • 100% COMPOSTABLE PACKAGING. Our packaging keeps the seed secure in its peanut free state and is kind to the environment. OUTER BAG: FSC certified paper suitable for home composting. It can also be recycled with regular paper recycling. INNER BAG: 100% plant based and BPI Certified Compostable under ASTM D6400 (where municipal or industrial facilities exist).

No grow seed heat treated at optimum temperature without use of any chemical treatment to prevent unwanted growth in your yard. They do not germinate, keeping your backyard clean without pesky pests or ingrown plants.

description:
About this item

BLUE SEAL WILD BIRD FEED: Blue Seal Neat Feast Wild Bird Seed is a convenient shell-free mix, attracts all types of birds, ideal for decks and patios
INCREASED SURVIVAL RATES: Survival rates were 38% higher in areas where bird feeders were present. Birds at sites with feeders have less stress than birds at sites without feeders.
ATTRACTS A WIDE VARIETY OF WILD BIRDS: American Goldfinch, Red-Bellied Woodpecker, Evening Grosbeak
INGREDIENTS: Sunflower chips, shelled peanuts, coarse cracked corn, pistachio nuts, walnuts, pecans, pumpkin seeds
TIPS FOR ATTRACTING WILD BIRDS: Birds will frequent your feeders more if you provide a consistent reliable source of feed. Setting out a bird bath and providing clean, fresh water will also attract birds not normally drawn to feeders.

description:
About this item

SEED MIX: Safflower
FEEDER: Use a feeder with no sharp edges or points; the design should allow birds to perch away from the food to keep it from becoming soiled. Set up more than one feeder and allow ample space between them to avoid crowding. Choose a feeder with drainage holes, and add a plastic dome to keep seed dry.
HANGING YOUR FEEDER: Bird feeders are best hung in a place where your visiting birds feel safe from predators. Most important: Avoid open and noisy areas and hang your bird feeders at eye level or a little above. Do not hang feeders too close to any place where squirrels can jump on them, or too low they are within a cat's reach.
BENEFITS: Whether you’re an avid birdwatcher or just like seeing wild birds in your backyard, you can keep them coming back with Pendelton's Safflower Seed. This elite, wild bird food is blended to attract the most desirable outdoor pets.
NUTRITION: Like all of Pendelton's bird seeds, Safflower Wild Bird Seed Mix is fortified with the essential vitamins, minerals, electrolytes and amino acids that wild birds need. It’s also free of chemical preservatives so you can feel good about offering it to the wildlife visiting your yard.

description: The Wagner's Safflower Seed Wild Bird Food is a 5-pound bag of birdseed made in the USA. It contains no artificial colors, flavors or preservatives. It is made with the highest quality grains and found in many gourmet birdseed mixes. The safflower seeds have a mild flavor that most squirrels generally dislike. This birdseed is suitable for small bird breeds and can be fed to birds of all life stages. Store the birdseed in a cool, dry location away from direct sunlight or heat sources. It is important to keep the seed sealed tightly in the original bag or stored in a sealed container to prevent moisture damage. The Wagner's Safflower Seed Wild Bird Food comes in a 5-pound bag and contains no peanuts.

description:
About this item

Peanuts are the best single source of protein and fat for your birds and a great addition to the choices you offer in your backyard.
No grow seed heat treated at optimum temperature without use of any chemical treatment to prevent unwanted growth in your yard. They do not germinate, keeping your backyard clean without pesky pests or ingrown plants.
Shelled Peanuts have their outer shells removed. No shells means No waste! They’re 100% edible, so your feeding area will be free of shell wastes.

description: Introducing our premium Wild Bird Seed Cylinder, a convenient and enticing option for attracting a delightful array of feathered visitors to your garden or backyard. This specially crafted cylinder is packed with a thoughtfully blended assortment of high-quality seeds, grains, and other wholesome ingredients to provide wild birds with the essential nutrients they need for optimal health and vitality. Each Wild Bird Seed Cylinder is carefully formulated to offer a diverse feast of nutrition, ensuring that your feathered friends receive a well-rounded diet. With a combination of premium seeds, including sunflower seeds, millet, and cracked corn, along with nutritious grains and wholesome ingredients, this cylinder is designed to attract a wide variety of bird species and cater to their specific dietary requirements. As birds flock to enjoy the delectable flavors and textures, they will also benefit from the nutrient-rich ingredients carefully selected for their well-being. The high-quality seeds and grains supply essential proteins, healthy fats, vitamins, and minerals, promoting strong feathers, robust immune systems, and overall vitality.

description:
Proudly MADE IN THE USA!
Birdie Blends Perch Party Bird Seed Large 4" Cylinder
Invite your Feathered Friends to a Fabulous Feast of a blend of premium black oil sunflower, sunflower chips, peanuts, and safflower. They will LOVE it! Attracting an amazing variety of wild birds, the Perch Party Blend is sure to leave your Feathered Friends Full.
All-Season Blend
Attracts a wide variety of feathered friends in every season!
Practical & Easy to Use
Easily hang with any seed cylinder hanger.
Long Lasting!
Generous size means this Seed Cylinder will last for days and days, no more running out to refill the feeders constantly. It can't be kicked all over the place like lose seed can. Large size lasts a long time and attracts loads of birds. No waste, no mess, never melt. Each cylinder is 4 × 4 × 7.75 in. and is a LARGE 1.5 lbs.
A Healthy Diet for your Feathered Friends
An amazing variety of birds visit these Seed Cylinders! In addition to the regular feeder birds such as;

Bluebirds
Cardinals
Chickadees
Woodpeckers
Nuthatches
Finches
Titmice

We have reports of various warblers, wrens, kinglets, blue buntings, mockingbirds, and others eating these cylinders. What makes this product special is the formula; a fantastic blend of premium black oil sunflower, sunflower chips, peanuts, and safflower. You will see the quality and the dramatic results in your own yard.

No Waste or Mess
Quality ingredients means these seed cylinders attract birds much more quickly than suet and without the problem of melting in the summer heat. Great for year-round bird feeding!

description:
About this item

WILD BIRD BLEND: Our blend of 50% black sunflower and nyjer seeds and 50% other grains is an effective choice choice for feeding wild birds, attracting more bird species than any other seed or wild bird meal. Our bird seed mix contains high-quality non-GMO bird feed grains, ensuring optimal nutritional value for your feathered friends.
QUALITY AND QUANTITY: Our wholesome blend of non-GMO grains, including black oil sunflower seeds, nyjer seed, cracked corn, milo seed, roasted soybeans, and wheat, is perfect for feeding wild birds. This mix attracts a diverse array of bird species and provides optimal nutritional value.
NUTRIENT-RICH: Our bird food for outside wild birds are packed with essential nutrients, promoting healthy growth and energy for birds, making them an ideal chicken feed and other critters. The darker the mix of bird seed, the higher the quality of ingredients.
VERSATILE USAGE: Suitable for various bird species, these wild bird seed for outside feeders can be used in bird feeder or scattered on the ground to attract a diverse range of wildlife.
SUSTAINABLE CHOICE: Our blend of bird seeds for outside wild birds promotes sustainable agriculture, offering a natural and healthy option for your backyard ecosystem.

description:
About this item

Our Sunflower Seed, Safflower Seed and Shelled Peanuts are the best grain to attract many varieties of colorful finches and other outdoor pet birds and are great for year-round feeding.
Packed in vacuum packaging helps in preventing the chances of contamination and spoilage of seeds due to moisture. The seeds remain intact and fresh with their natural flavor for birds to feed.
Extra clean Human grade seeds which are high in oil, protein and energy content for nutrition to the birds and maintain their healthy lifestyle.
These are No grow seeds, heat treated at optimum temperature without use of any chemical treatment to prevent unwanted growth in your yard. They do not germinate, keeping your backyard clean without pesky pests or ingrown plants.
Processed in a USDA & BRC-GS approved facility with stringent quality checks. Our Seeds meet the quality standards set by the 'Wild Bird Feeding Institute' and the 'Food Safety & Modernisation Act'.

description:
About this item

Locally Sourced for Premium Quality: Our white proso millet is proudly sourced from trusted farms across the United States. This not only ensures top-tier quality but also supports local agriculture.
Pure & Wholesome for Bird Health: Our white proso millet is crafted with care, free from additives and preservatives. This natural choice for bird feed contributes to the well-being of your feathered friends, offering them a safe and nourishing diet.
Naturally Nutrient-Rich Bird Feed: Our white proso millet naturally offers a wealth of essential vitamins and minerals. It's an ideal choice to enrich the diet of your birds, providing the nourishment they need for health and vitality across various species.
Attract a Diverse Bird Population: Our white millet is a favorite among a wide array of birds, including finches, sparrows, and doves. Its appealing taste and nutritional value make it an ideal feed for bird watchers looking to attract diverse avian life.
Freshness Sealed In: The quality of our millet is preserved in resealable packaging, ensuring lasting freshness. Easy to store and maintain, it allows you to offer consistently fresh and nutritious feed to birds.

description:
About this item

🦜This is the perfect mix for year around feasting for your backyard birds. The Wild Bird Seed Cylinder is a great way to feed even the most demanding backyard birds. The cylinder is made up of layers of seeds conveniently stacked inside one big container, ideal for those who love to enjoy watching their feathered friends go crazy over fresh food!
🦜Create a healthy seed mixture that birds can consume every day. Made with beef gelatin and mixed in with Wild Bird Seed Cylinders, it's the best way to ensure you're providing the proper nutrition. Beef gelatin is a natural protein, enabling birds to digest their food more slowly. It is also good for the birds' digestion and for gizzard stones.
🦜Bird seed feeders are one of the best ways to provide food for your favorite wild birds. This Wild Bird Seed Cylinder is a top choice and it has a pre-drilled hole which lets you attach it to any cylinder birdfeeder or other hardware stabilization system.
🦜 The cylindrical design is perfect for outside birds as it fits any outdoor cylinder birdfeeder to create a safe, natural habitat. The perforated bottom helps prevent the cylinder from collapsing. Ideal for feeding migrating birds and other species that visit your backyard regularly. Dimension: 7" Tall x 4" Circumference
🦜 This blend of native seeds provides the essential macronutrients needed by birds, including protein, fat and fiber. We also offer a variety of grains for additional taste and nutrition options.It's designed to provide birds with fresh food every day, no matter how long the winter lasts or how little food there is for them. ❄️🍃☀️🍂

description:
About this item

Peanuts are a high energy food source and a great supplement to the diets of many wild animals.
Packed with proteins and essential fatty acids and can be fed to wildlife year-round.
Place a handful of peanuts in your peanut feeder, or simply toss them in your yard to attract squirrels, birds, chipmunks, ducks, geese, raccoons, deer, and other outdoor wildlife.
Bird types attracted to our peanuts include Blue Jays, Scrub Jays, Stellar Jays, Cardinals, Ravens, Pigeons, Woodpeckers, Parrots, Doves, Magpies, Bluebirds and many more!

Songbird Essentials Essential Nuts & Berries Premium Blend Bird Seed and Fruit is Nitrogen Flushed for Optimal Freshness During Shipping. It is Highly Recommended to Freeze Bird Seed for 48 Hours Before Opening, and Keep in an Airtight Container After Opening.
Essential Nuts & Berries Includes Nearly Every Bird's Favorites. Contains Sunflower Kernels, Black Oil and Striped Sunflower Seed, Peanuts, Pistachios, Dried Cranberries and Raisins.
Essential Nuts & Berries Have a Good Supply of Fat and Protein, Providing Energy and Nutrition for Wild Birds. Songbird Essentials Premium Nuts & Berries Blend is All Natural and Contains No Fillers.
Premium Nuts & Berries can be Used in Flat Feeders, Tube Feeders and Hoppers with Good Clearance. You'll Find it Attracts Everyone from Woodpeckers and Jays to Cardinals and Chickadees.
Songbird Essentials Premium Bird Feed is Designed for Optimal Songbird Attraction and Health. All Natural with No Fillers.

description:
About this item

6 Pack Bundle of 4 oz. Golden Safflower Seed Cakes!
Attracts birds much more quickly than suet and without the problem of melting in the summer heat.
Golden Safflower is different than your normal safflower seed because its higher in oil content, higher in protein, and higher in fat - Making it more desirable to birds!
These blocks are preferred by cardinals, grosbeaks and more, where grackles, sparrows and starlings generally dont like safflower.
Great for year-round bird feeding.

description:
No Mess, No Waste: Say goodbye to the hassle of cleaning up birdseed shells and scattered debris. With our shelled sunflower chips, you're providing your birds with 100% edible food, reducing waste and keeping your feeding area clean and tidy.
Premium Nutrition for Your Feathered Friends: Our Sunflower Chips are meticulously selected to offer the finest, high-quality nutrition to your backyard birds. These medium-sized, shelled sunflower chips are a favorite among a wide variety of bird species, making them the perfect choice for your bird feeders.
Packed with Essential Nutrients: Our Sunflower Chips are a nutritional powerhouse, rich in proteins, healthy fats, and essential vitamins and minerals. They provide the energy your birds need to thrive throughout the year, whether during breeding season, migration, or cold winter months.
Versatile Feeding Option: These sunflower chips are highly versatile and can be used in a range of feeders, including hopper, platform, and tube feeders. You'll have the flexibility to cater to the preferences of different bird species that visit your backyard.
Attract a Variety of Bird Species: From colorful finches and cardinals to energetic chickadees and woodpeckers, our Sunflower Chips are an irresistible treat for a wide array of wild birds. Watch your backyard come alive with vibrant avian visitors.

description:
About this item

🌾 White Millet is NOT a filler. It is beloved by a wide variety of wild birds!
🐦🔥 White Millet is a favorite of the beautiful painted bunting.
🐤This under-appreciated grain is a fantastic nutritional value for wild birds: Containing 12% protein, 8% fiber, and magnesium.
🌾🌻Feed the white millet straight or mix it with other seeds to create your own wild bird food mix.
🧹White millet makes very little mess. The husks are thin and easily blow away in the wind. Valley Farms white millet is vacuumed cleaned and always fresh.
🐤White Millet is best in tube feeders with finch ports, some hopper feeders, window feeders, and sprinkled on the ground for groundfeeding birds, like doves.
🗽Valley Farms is made in the USA by a family owned and opperated small business.

description: Welcome the joyous American Goldfinch song and colorful plumage of Purple Finches, plus Pine Siskins or cute Redpolls to your backyard. This specialty mix from Valley Farms caters to the small beaked wild birds. A wild bird feeder with smaller openings will be the best choice for attracting the lovable, yet discerning Finches. Expect to see the Gold Finch, House Finch, Purple Finch, among the species attracted to these ingredients which include thistle or Nyjer seed, canary seed, Golden German Finch Millet, fine Sunflower chips or hearts. These are all naturally mini sized seeds which are perfect for cute Finches! Birds you may see include: the american goldfinch, house finch, purple finch, mouning dove (ground feeder) pine siskin, common & hoary redpoll, dark eyed junco, indigo bunting, song sparrows, towhees, California Quail and chickadees. Year - round consumption by wild birds with a slightly less consumption rate during late summer & early autumn due to the abundance of naturally occurring seed which wild birds will forage for during these times as well. Feeders can still be frequently visited however during this time. Feed the birds and enjoy nature!

description:
About this item

SEED MIX: Sunflower Chips (Fine), Canary Seed, Millet (Red, White, German), Nyjer Seed, Rapeseed, Flaxseed
FEEDER: Use a feeder with no sharp edges or points; the design should allow birds to perch away from the food to keep it from becoming soiled. Set up more than one feeder and allow ample space between them to avoid crowding. Choose a feeder with drainage holes, and add a plastic dome to keep seed dry.
HANGING YOUR FEEDER: Bird feeders are best hung in a place where your visiting birds feel safe from predators. Most important: Avoid open and noisy areas and hang your bird feeders at eye level or a little above. Do not hang feeders too close to any place where squirrels can jump on them, or too low they are within a cat's reach.
BENEFITS: Whether you’re an avid birdwatcher or just like seeing wild birds in your backyard, you can keep them coming back with Pendelton's Wild Finch Mix Extra Bird Seed. This elite, wild bird food is blended to attract the most desirable outdoor pets.
NUTRITION: Like all of Pendelton's bird seeds, Wild Finch Mix Extra Bird Seed Mix is fortified with the essential vitamins, minerals, electrolytes and amino acids that wild birds need. It’s also free of chemical preservatives so you can feel good about offering it to the wildlife visiting your yard.

description:
About this item

You will receive (1) 6-pound bag with your order. This bird food is a true favorite amongst large sized nut-loving wild birds.
This is a high-quality bird food formulated with 100% pure peanuts in the shell.
Peanuts are packed with fat and protein, offering birds a rich source of calories and essential nutrients, especially beneficial during the winter months. Peanuts in the shell are also a desired food for squirrel and chipmunk feeding.
It can be fed on its own or blended with wild bird seed and is best used with a platform feeder or on the ground. Packaged in a barrier bag, sealed air tight and CO2 flushed to preserve optimal freshness. Packaging is in the process of being updated and may vary.
Attracts: Blue Jays, Steller’s Jays, Downy Woodpeckers, Hairy Woodpeckers, Red-bellied Woodpeckers, Squirrels, Chipmunks

description: Nyjer seed (Thistle seed) is the absolute favorite of Finches, such as the American Goldfinch, Purple Finch, Pine Siskin, and other small Songbirds. This tiny delicacy is used in Finch feeders which have smaller holes and tiny perches-perfect for the Finches but discouraging to larger birds! Wagner's Nyjer seed is the ultimate choice for nurturing Finches with its high fat and protein content. Nyjer seed packs an incredible 150,000 seeds per pound and the seeds create no waste, no mess, no growth and produce more visits to your feeder. Fill your Finch feeder with Wagner's Nyjer seed and enjoy the antics of these beautiful and sociable birds in your backyard. Wagner's has been a trusted supplier of wild bird food for over 100 years.

description:
"

Enhance your backyard birds’ diet with PRDSeed Shelled Bird Feed Peanuts! Our advanced process removes the shells to make them easier to digest, giving birds the nutrition they need in a form they can easily eat. Bird food can be a great way to attract birds to your backyard and these peanuts provide an excellent source of protein and fat that many birds need for optimal health. Birds such as woodpeckers, finches, cardinals, and chickadees just to name a few, can all benefit from shelled peanuts.

This peanut mix includes both raw peanuts so there are no waste and no mess bird seed options. Unsalted peanuts are the ideal supplement for a variety of birds, and for backyard squirrels, too. The unshelled peanuts can also help reduce your clean up time. This bird seed is a must have for when the birds come in from long evening flights. For your convenience, these shelled bird feed peanuts come in a 10 lb, 35 lb, or a 40 lb bag for larger flocks.

Our peanuts offer plenty of nutritious goodies for the wild birds to enjoy. Don’t forget to offer this bird food during the winter months too – many birds rely on it as an important food source during the cold months. Make sure your backyard birds know that you care this season and give them the nutrition they need with the shelled bird feed peanuts!

"

description:
About this item

You will receive (1) 10-pound bag with your order.
This is a high quality blend that was designed with finches and small songbirds in mind.
Features a variety of ingredients that finches love, including white millet, canola, Siberian millet, red millet, golden German millet, nyjer and sunflower kernel chips.
Packaged in a barrier bag, sealed air tight and CO2 flushed to preserve optimal freshness.
It can be fed on its own or blended with wild bird seed and is best used with a small port finch tube feeder.
Attracts: American Goldfinches, House Finches, Purple Finches, Common Redpolls, Pine Siskins, American Tree Sparrows and House Sparrows.

description:
Proudly MADE IN THE USA!
Birdie Blends Perch Party Bird Seed Large 4" Cylinder
Invite your Feathered Friends to a Fabulous Feast of a blend of premium black oil sunflower, sunflower chips, peanuts, and safflower. They will LOVE it! Attracting an amazing variety of wild birds, the Perch Party Blend is sure to leave your Feathered Friends Full.
All-Season Blend
Attracts a wide variety of feathered friends in every season!
Practical & Easy to Use
Easily hang with any seed cylinder hanger.
Long Lasting!
Generous size means this Seed Cylinder will last for days and days, no more running out to refill the feeders constantly. It can't be kicked all over the place like lose seed can. Large size lasts a long time and attracts loads of birds. No waste, no mess, never melt. Each cylinder is 4 × 4 × 7.75 in. and is a LARGE 1.5 lbs.
A Healthy Diet for your Feathered Friends
An amazing variety of birds visit these Seed Cylinders! In addition to the regular feeder birds such as;

Bluebirds
Cardinals
Chickadees
Woodpeckers
Nuthatches
Finches
Titmice

We have reports of various warblers, wrens, kinglets, blue buntings, mockingbirds, and others eating these cylinders. What makes this product special is the formula; a fantastic blend of premium black oil sunflower, sunflower chips, peanuts, and safflower. You will see the quality and the dramatic results in your own yard.

No Waste or Mess
Quality ingredients means these seed cylinders attract birds much more quickly than suet and without the problem of melting in the summer heat. Great for year-round bird feeding!

description:
Wagner's 18542 Cracked Corn Wild Bird Food, 10-Pound Bag
Our Wagner's Cracked Corn is enjoyed by a variety of ground feeding birds such as Blue Jays, Cardinals, Doves, Juncos, Quail, Pheasants, Ducks and Grouse. Rabbits, chipmunks and other playful wildlife will be attracted as well. It can be fed on its own or mixed with other seed. Many people feed cracked corn separately from their regular bird feeding area so that playful squirrels and other small animals have their own place to eat - diverting them from eating at your bird feeders. Sprinkle some on the ground where it is easily accessible by both birds and animals. Use Wagner’s Cracked Corn and enjoy that "close to nature" feeling that comes with feeding your own backyard wildlife. Trust your backyard birds to the experts at Wagner’s.
Wagner's 13008 Deluxe Wild Bird Food, 10 lb Bag
Wagner’s Deluxe Wild Bird Food Blend with sunflower and general purpose seeds offers the backyard enthusiast a value plus moderately priced food that is the real deal! Deluxe Blend can be used in all types of feeders as well as being a great mix to attract those wonderful ground feeding birds. You’ll get all the regular customers like Cardinals, Chickadees and Finches as well as other indigenous backyard visitors. Trust your backyard birds to the experts at Wagner’s.

description:
About this item

🦜This is the perfect mix for year around feasting for your backyard birds. The Wild Bird Seed Cylinder is a great way to feed even the most demanding backyard birds. The cylinder is made up of layers of seeds conveniently stacked inside one big container, ideal for those who love to enjoy watching their feathered friends go crazy over fresh food!
🦜Create a healthy seed mixture that birds can consume every day. Made with beef gelatin and mixed in with Wild Bird Seed Cylinders, it's the best way to ensure you're providing the proper nutrition. Beef gelatin is a natural protein, enabling birds to digest their food more slowly. It is also good for the birds' digestion and for gizzard stones.
🦜Bird seed feeders are one of the best ways to provide food for your favorite wild birds. This Wild Bird Seed Cylinder is a top choice and it has a pre-drilled hole which lets you attach it to any cylinder birdfeeder or other hardware stabilization system.
🦜 The cylindrical design is perfect for outside birds as it fits any outdoor cylinder birdfeeder to create a safe, natural habitat. The perforated bottom helps prevent the cylinder from collapsing. Ideal for feeding migrating birds and other species that visit your backyard regularly. Dimension: 7" Tall x 4" Circumference
🦜 This blend of native seeds provides the essential macronutrients needed by birds, including protein, fat and fiber. We also offer a variety of grains for additional taste and nutrition options.It's designed to provide birds with fresh food every day, no matter how long the winter lasts or how little food there is for them. ❄️🍃☀️🍂
🦜Made in the USA : Proudly handmade in the heart of 🚩 Midwest Missouri.

description:
About this item

You will receive (1) 20-pound bag with your order.
Royal Jubilee Gold Standard is a premium blend crafted without compromise and with finches in mind.
This high-quality blend is made with only two ingredients: nyjer seed and sunflower kernels.
Nyjer seeds are a highly desired food for wild finches, while sunflower kernels offer all of the high energy benefits as black oil sunflower seeds, but without the shells and associated weed growth.
Can be fed on its own or blended with other wild bird seed.
Packaged in an airtight barrier bag and C02 flushed to preserve freshness.
Best used with a tube feeder with small ports.
Attracts: American Goldfinches, Purple Finches, House Finches, Dark-eyed Juncos, Black-capped Chickadees, Common Redpolls, Pine Siskins and House Sparrows.

description:
About this item

You will receive (1) 25-pound bag of black oil sunflower seeds and (1) 8-pound bag of the Colourful Bird blend with your order.
Black oil sunflower seeds are rich in fat and protein, offering a filling, long-lasting source of energy. Their high nutrient content and thin shells make them irresistible to nearly every bird species.
The Colourful Bird blend includes high-quality ingredients including nyjer, safflower, black oil sunflower, peanuts, white millet, sunflower chips, canary seed, raisins, red millet, and juniper berries to aid in superior digestion, absorption and overall health.
Best used in feeders with large openings such as tube feeders, hopper feeders, window feeders or tray feeders.
Both bags are sealed air tight and CO2 flushed for optimal freshness.
These seeds can be stored in a cool, dry place for long periods of time which makes them an excellent option for bulk purchases and long-term storage without any loss in quality.

description:
About this item

SHELLED PEANUTS: Premium shelled peanuts for birds are protein rich & 100% edible. These backyard peanuts have no skins so there's no mess, and no waste.
PEANUTS FOR BIRDS: Woodpeckers, Cardinals, Jays & Nuthatches simply love them! High in oils and fats that provide energy and is rich in calories and protein which promotes growth and good health.
PEANUTS FOR SQUIRRELS: Peanuts are an excellent source of food for backyard squirrels and chipmunks.
RESEALABLE BAG: Convenient heavy-duty resealable bag for easy storage. Produced in USA (Pennsylvania.)
NO SKINS: The deshelled peanuts have their skins removed so there's no waste, no mess. The whole peanut (not chips) offers a premium source of energy without the mess in your yard.

You will receive (1) 25-pound bag of black oil sunflower seeds and (1) 4-pound bag of the Royal Jubilee Persistence bird seed blend with your order.
Black oil sunflower seeds are rich in fat and protein, offering a filling, long-lasting source of energy. Their high nutrient content and thin shells make them irresistible to nearly every bird species.

description: Welcome the joyous American Goldfinch song and colorful plumage of Purple Finches, plus Pine Siskins or cute Redpolls to your backyard. This specialty mix from Valley Farms caters to the small beaked wild birds. A wild bird feeder with smaller openings will be the best choice for attracting the lovable, yet discerning Finches. Expect to see the Gold Finch, House Finch, Purple Finch, among the species attracted to these ingredients which include thistle or Nyjer seed, canary seed, Golden German Finch Millet, fine Sunflower chips or hearts. These are all naturally mini sized seeds which are perfect for cute Finches! Birds you may see include: the american goldfinch, house finch, purple finch, mouning dove (ground feeder) pine siskin, common & hoary redpoll, dark eyed junco, indigo bunting, song sparrows, towhees, California Quail and chickadees. Year - round consumption by wild birds with a slightly less consumption rate during late summer & early autumn due to the abundance of naturally occurring seed which wild birds will forage for during these times as well. Feeders can still be frequently visited however during this time. INGREDIENTS: Nyjer Seed, German & Siberian Millet, Fine Sunflower Chips, Canary Seed ^ & White Millet. Feed the birds and enjoy nature!

description:
About this item

You will receive (1) 25-pound bag of black oil sunflower seeds and (1) 4.4-pound bag of peanut halves with your order.
Black oil sunflower seeds are rich in fat and protein, offering a filling, long-lasting source of energy. Their high nutrient content and thin shells make them irresistible to nearly every bird species.
Shelled peanut halves offer the same high levels of protein, fat, and energy as in-shell peanuts, but without the added effort. Peanut halves are also a desired alternative for smaller species, such as squirrels and chipmunks.
Best used in feeders with large openings such as tube feeders, hopper feeders, window feeders or tray feeders.
Both bags are sealed air tight and CO2 flushed for optimal freshness.
These seeds can be stored in a cool, dry place for long periods of time which makes them an excellent option for bulk purchases and long-term storage without any loss in quality.

description:
About this item

Premium Quality Bird Food: Mycelium Premium Wild Bird Corn is carefully selected and processed by dedicated family-owned farms in the USA, ensuring the highest quality grains with consistent nutritional value for wild birds such as turkeys, quails, pheasants and doves.
Rich in Essential Nutrients: Mycelium Premium Wild Bird Corn is packed with essential nutrients, offering a delicious and nutritious diet to support the health and vitality of various wild bird species.
Eco-Friendly Commitment: Our ingredients are grown using sustainable farming methods that support soil regeneration and healthy biodiversity, making them kind to the planet.
100% Organic and Safe: Certified organic and non-GMO, our corn is free from synthetic pesticides and chemicals, providing a safe, natural diet for wild birds.
Easy to Use: Our premium corn is simple to distribute, making feeding wild birds effortless. Ideal for maintaining the health and vitality of various wild bird species.

description:
Bring woodpeckers and other songbirds to your nutritious backyard bird garden when you offer these Wildlife Sciences Woodpecker Crunch Seed Towers in it. This pack of 6 generous, 4.5 pound seed towers features a healthy and caloric snack formulated from peanuts, black oil sunflower seeds, cracked corn, and other tasty elements, to offer a unique and wholesome feeding option for woodpeckers and other feathered friends. To feed this delectable option to hungry birds, insert one of the included seed towers into your existing Wildlife Sciences Seed Tower Feeder (not included), letting the feeder's center rod secure the unit in place through its hole while the seed log’s vegetable gelatin serves to retain its compact shape throughout feeding. This ensures a mess-free sustenance option for local birds as they visit your garden, and the collection of 6 robust logs lets you situate multiple units in your different tower feeders to feed a litany of birds throughout your backyard haven. Each unit is sealed in secure packaging, allowing you to safely store them away when not in use. For a different effect around your yard, set these units on sizable platform feeders to lend birds a variable method of access to these delectable morsels. Transform your bird sanctuary into a bustling, nutritional destination and help feathered friends thrive with these Woodpecker Crunch Seed Towers. Made in the USA.
This case pack contains 6 Wildlife Sciences Woodpecker Crunch Seed Towers.
Birds that enjoy this seed tower: blackbirds, cardinals, chickadees, crows, doves, finches, flickers, goldfinches, grackles, grosbeaks, jays, juncos, mockingbirds, nuthatches, pheasants, pigeons, quail, redpolls, siskins, sparrows, starlings, titmice, towhees, woodpeckers, and wrens
Feeder Options: seed log feeders, platform, or tray feeders
Contents: 6 seed towers
Weight: 4.5 lbs. each
Dimensions: 6" dia. x 7.5"H each

description:
Complete your bird garden accessories and ensure seed remains dry using this Woodlink Rustic Farmhouse Seed Container and 15 pounds of Divine Blend Seed. Placing seed in a sealed container stops air and rain from reaching it, keeping it fresh and dry for your feathered friends. The galvanized metal construction of the Woodlink Rustic Farmhouse Seed Storage Container with Scoop brings a bit of farmhouse style to your yard, enhanced by impressed vertical and horizontal lines. A latching lid protects the included, 15 pounds of Divine Blend Seed from insect or rodent pests, and the included seed scoop makes filling your feeders simple. This scoop rests in an integrated pocket on the side of the container for the utmost convenience. The mottled gray hues further the farmhouse look, finished by a top handle with wooden grip. Help your favorite birder keep his or her seed dry and conveniently placed with this Rustic Farmhouse Seed Container and 15 pounds of Divine Blend Seed bundle.

description:
Proudly MADE IN THE USA!
Birdie Blends Perch Party Bird Seed Large 4" Cylinder
Invite your Feathered Friends to a Fabulous Feast of a blend of premium black oil sunflower, sunflower chips, peanuts, and safflower. They will LOVE it! Attracting an amazing variety of wild birds, the Perch Party Blend is sure to leave your Feathered Friends Full.
All-Season Blend
Attracts a wide variety of feathered friends in every season!
Practical & Easy to Use
Easily hang with any seed cylinder hanger.
Long Lasting!
Generous size means this Seed Cylinder will last for days and days, no more running out to refill the feeders constantly. It can't be kicked all over the place like lose seed can. Large size lasts a long time and attracts loads of birds. No waste, no mess, never melt. Each cylinder is 4 × 4 × 7.75 in. and is a LARGE 1.5 lbs.
A Healthy Diet for your Feathered Friends
An amazing variety of birds visit these Seed Cylinders! In addition to the regular feeder birds such as;

Bluebirds
Cardinals
Chickadees
Woodpeckers
Nuthatches
Finches
Titmice

We have reports of various warblers, wrens, kinglets, blue buntings, mockingbirds, and others eating these cylinders. What makes this product special is the formula; a fantastic blend of premium black oil sunflower, sunflower chips, peanuts, and safflower. You will see the quality and the dramatic results in your own yard.

No Waste or Mess
Quality ingredients means these seed cylinders attract birds much more quickly than suet and without the problem of melting in the summer heat. Great for year-round bird feeding!

description:
Watch your backyard birds go crazy over their favorite foods by adding these Pine Tree Farms Nutsie Seed Bells with Nets to your yard. The whimsical shape of these 4 pieces easily captures attention, while the mixture of nuts and dried fruit is great for a wealth of birds. The nuts and sunflower hearts offer necessary protein and fat to your feathered friends, while the dried fruit adds flavor. A gelatin binding helps the bells maintain their shape, and the included, purple mesh nets make the items simple to hang. Invite a wealth of birds to dine in your yard by placing these Nutsie Seed Bells with Nets in it. Made in the USA.
This case pack contains 4 of the Pine Tree Farms Nutsie Seed Bells with Nets, 18 oz. each.
Birds that enjoy these seed bells: blackbirds, cardinals, chickadees, crows, doves, finches, flickers, goldfinches, grackles, grosbeaks, jays, juncos, mockingbirds, nuthatches, redpolls, siskins, sparrows, starlings, titmice, towhees, woodpeckers, and wrens
Ingredients: mixed tree nuts (may include pistachios, almonds, cashews, and pecans), peanuts, sunflower hearts, pecans, dried fruit, gelatin
Guaranteed Analysis: minimum crude protein 20%, minimum crude fat 40%, maximum crude fiber 5%, maximum moisture 12%
Weight: 18 oz. each
Dimensions: 4.75" base dia. x 5"H each
Mounting: may be hung with included net

description:
NATURE'S NUTS DELUXE DOVE & QUAIL BLEND - WILD BIRD FOOD

Everything Quail and Doves love! A very economical mix.

ALL THAT NATURE INTENDED

Welcome to the fun-filled world of Nature’s Nuts. Enjoying nature is easy with our NUT-TRICIOUS blend of seeds and nuts. We have searched the world over to bring you the freshest natural ingredients for bird and wildlife feeding. It is our belief that nature provides the best solutions for feeding, so you will never find artificial colors, oils or fillers in our seed. Nature’s Nuts has produced and harvested seed for over thirty years and has used this know-how to provide birders and nature enthusiasts with a premium natural choice in wildlife diets.

DELUXE DOVE & QUAIL BLEND

Ingredients: White Millet, Safflower Seed, Canola Seed, Canary Seed, Wheat, Cracked Corn.

Attracts: All Doves, all Quail, Jays, Sparrows, and Towhees.

Feeder Type: Hopper, Ground, Bowl.

NATURE'S NUTS

To turn your backyard into a miniature nature reserve you must provide plenty of quality food, water, and shelter. With the help of Nature’s Nuts you can provide a haven for wildlife, giving your entire family hours of enjoyment, and a respect for nature that will last a lifetime. For a birds-eye-view, place feeders in an area that is easy to watch and accessible to your backyard friends. Make sure this area is close to a bush or tree so that birds can fly into cover, and look around, before feeding. To attract a variety of birds, we recommend one feeder that is suspended or mounted, coupled with a ground-feeding tray. This will keep competition to a minimum between smaller and larger birds. Above all, be patient. Your birds may take a few weeks to locate a new feeder. But rest assured, once they find it, they will be back for more. Winter creates a special demand for a high-energy diet, while spring and early summer finds seeds and nuts in short supply. So stay stocked for your flock!

description:
About this item

Songbird Essentials Hearty Hearts Premium Bird Food is Nitrogen Flushed for Optimal Freshness During Shipping. It is Highly Recommended to Freeze Bird Seed for 48 Hours Before Opening, and Keep in an Airtight Container After Opening.
Premium Shell Free Seed is Most Loved by Finches, Bluebirds, Titmice, Chickadees, Cardinals, Woodpeckers and More. Try it in Their Favorite Bird Feeders.
Shell Free Sunflower Hearts Have a Good Supply of Fat and Protein, Providing Energy and Nutrition for Wild Birds. Songbird Essentials Hearty Hearts is All Natural and Contains No Fillers.
Hulled Sunflower Seeds for Birds are a Favorite for Many Song Birds and will Leave Less Mess Around Your Feeders.
Songbird Essentials Premium Bird Seed is Designed for Optimal Songbird Attraction and Health. All Natural with No Fillers, and No Shells Left Behind.

description:
Proudly MADE IN THE USA!
Bugs, Nuts & Fruit Block
Bugs, Nuts & Fruit A delectable feast for an amazing variety of wild birds. This formula is sure to attract your favorite feathered friends
Practical & Easy to Use
Easily hang in a block feeder (not included).
Long Lasting!
Generous size means these blocks will last for days and days, no more running out to refill the feeders constantly. It can't be kicked all over the place like lose seed can. Attracts loads of birds. No waste, no mess, never melt.
A Healthy Diet for your Feathered Friends
An amazing variety of birds visit these Seed blocks! In addition to the regular feeder birds such as;

Cardinals
Chickadees
Woodpeckers
Nuthatches
Finches
Titmice

We have reports of various Warblers, Wrens, Kinglets, Mockingbirds, and even Bluebirds eating these Seed blocks. What makes this product special is the formula; a fantastic blend of mealworms, pecans, sunflower hearts, raisins and cranberries. BUG APPETIT! You will see the quality and the dramatic results in your own yard.

No Waste or Mess
Quality ingredients means these seed blocks attract birds much more quickly than suet and without the problem of melting in the summer heat. Great for year-round bird feeding

description:
About this item

You will receive (1) 20-pound bag with your order. This bird food is a true favorite amongst small and large sized nut-loving wild birds year round.
This is a high-quality bird food formulated with 100% pure peanut halves.
Shelled peanut halves provide the same high levels of protein, fat, and energy as in-shell peanuts, delivering a rich source of calories and essential nutrients to birds with added convenience, particularly beneficial during the winter months.
Peanut halves are also a desired alternative for smaller species, such as squirrels and chipmunks.
It can be fed on its own or blended with wild bird seed and is ideal for use with a platform feeder or used on the ground.
Packaged in a barrier bag, sealed air tight and CO2 flushed to preserve optimal freshness.
Attracts: Blue Jays, Steller’s Jays, Downy Woodpeckers, Hairy Woodpeckers, Red-bellied Woodpeckers, Northern Cardinals, Black-capped Chickadees, White and Red-breasted Nuthatches, Squirrels, Chipmunks.

Premium Quality Bird Food: Mycelium Brand Bird Watcher Millet is carefully selected and processed by dedicated family-owned farms in the USA, ensuring the highest quality grains with consistent nutritional value for various bird species.

description:
Lyric Supreme Wild Bird Seed, Wild Bird Food Mix with Nuts and Sunflower Seeds, 20 lb. Bag
Lyric Supreme is our most popular wild bird food. We selected a wide variety of all natural, tested ingredients to attract feeder birds like finch, clinging birds who like nuts like woodpeckers and nuthatches and ground feeders like doves. We have large seeds like black oil sunflower for cardinals and small seeds like white millet for juncos. Lyric Supreme is the preferred mix of backyard birders for many reasons. Supreme has a wide variety of the finest natural nutrients with hand-crafted quality and is created by long-time bird feeding hobbyists. Try Supreme by Lyric with the finest nutrients, you'll see the difference.
Lyric Fruit and Nut Wild Bird Seed, High Energy Wild Bird Food Mix, 5 lb. Bag
Lyric Fruit and Nut Wild Bird Food contains no fillers and provides high energy. Attracts chickadees, robins, orioles, Blue Jays, titmice, buntings, cardinals, grosbeaks, towhees, nuthatches and Cedar Waxwings. Contains nuts, roasted and shelled peanuts, valencia peanuts, almonds, pecans, cashews, pistachios, cranberries, raisins, sunflower kernels, shelled pumpkin seeds, crimped corn.

description:
CHUCKANUT BACKYARD WILDLIFE BLEND - WILDLIFE FOOD

Gourmet food blended to satisfy all of your backyard visitors!

ALL THAT NATURE INTENDED

Squirrels, chipmunks, rabbits, and other small animals are an important part of enjoying any backyard environment. Their energy and crazy antics will give you and your family a daily dose of fun and excitement. CHUCKANUT BACKYARD WILDLIFE BLEND is specifically formulated to attract a wide variety of small animals to compliment any backyard. For hours of relaxation and enjoyment encourage these creatures to become regular visitors. CHUCKANUT BACKYARD WILDLIFE BLEND makes it easy to show your love of nature by giving these animals what they want and need.

CHUCKANUT BACKYARD WILDLIFE BLEND - WILDLIFE FOOD

Ingredients: A gourmet mix of Pumpkin Seed, Peanuts, Sunflower Seed, and Corn.

Attracts: Squirrels, Chipmunks, Rabbits, Blue and Stellar’s Jays.

Feeder Type: Chuckanut Squirrel Feeder, Hopper, Chalet, Bowl.

CHUCKANUT PRODUCTS

Place CHUCKANUT BACKYARD WILDLIFE BLEND in a place which is easy for you to watch, and accessible to your outdoor pets. The use of a squirrel feeder is recommended. You may also use certain ground feeders or feeder boxes which if set up in an area away from bird feeders will keep your squirrels and chipmunks out of them. Since most wildlife does not hibernate, feeding should continue year-round. Now enjoy watching your backyard become a habitat for all of nature.

description:
Wagner's 62034 Greatest Variety Blend Wild Bird Food, 6-Pound Bag
Wagner's Greatest Variety is our ultimate food for the greatest variety of birds. Just like people, different birds have different food preferences which is why we have included the greatest variety of bird food ingredients in this product. With these 11 carefully selected bird food ingredients, we guarantee that Wagner’s Greatest Variety will attract all your favorite songbirds to your feeder. The black oil sunflower, striped sunflower and sunflower chips, which together represent over 40% of the blend are the top food choice for the greatest number of wild bird species. By offering sunflower seeds in different sizes, both hulled and unhulled, birds of various sizes can find their favorite food. White millet, red millet, cracked corn, and red milo will attract a variety of ground feeders such as Tree Sparrows, Song Sparrows, House Sparrows, Dark-eyed Juncos, and Mourning Doves to your backyard. Nyjer, peanut kernels, canary seed and safflower, will attract specific species of preferred birds ranging from Cardinals, Chickadees and Titmice to Jays, Finches and Woodpeckers. Trust your backyard birds to the experts at Wagner’s.
Wagner's 62067 Deluxe Treat Blend Wild Bird Food, 4-Pound Bag
Wagner's Deluxe Treat Wild Bird Food is a deluxe wild bird food with a treat - safflower seed. Wagner’s Deluxe Treat is a quality blend of seeds including black oil sunflower as well as different varieties of safflower seed. This colorful high quality blend will bring all your favorite and beautiful songbirds to your backyard. By offering your backyard birds a larger quantity of the seeds they enjoy, you will be rewarded with many different types of songbirds that will come to your feeders. Cardinals, Chickadees, Titmice, Nuthatches and Jays will be frequent visitors to your backyard. This blend works well in all types of feeders. Trust your backyard birds to the experts at Wagner’s.

description:
Wild Delight Sizzle N' Heat Bird Food, 5 lb
Sizzle N' Heat is premium hot blend wild bird food designed for BIRDS ONLY. It will effectively deter most squirrels.
Industry studies show that squirrels are listed as the #1 reason for people leaving the bird feeding category. Squirrels dominate feeders, create a mess and eat much of the seed, nuts, and fruits. After much development and product testing, we created Sizzle N' Heat, a squirrel deterrent product. While this is not a squirrel proof product, our studies showed it to be a very effective squirrel deterrent. While squirrels may still visit and feed at feeders, once they get a taste of the hot seeds, most will look for other sources of food. As with any Wild Delight product, ensuring the best bird feeding experience is the #1 goal. So Sizzle N' Heat is filled with the same highly desired ingredients birds love, with none of the filler ingredients.
Made with chili peppers, a strong irritant. Keep out of reach of children. Avoid contact with eyes, nose, and skin. Wash hands thoroughly after using.
Primary Attracted Species: Songbirds, Cardinals, Finches, Nuthatches, Jays, Chickadees, Titmice, Grosbeaks and other outdoor pets.
Ingredients: Sunflower Kernels, Sunflower Seed, Peanuts, Pistachios, Soybean Oil, Capsicum, Vitamin A Supplement, Vitamin D-3 Supplement, Vitamin E Supplement, Menadione Sodium Bisulfite Complex, Thiamine Mononitrate, Riboflavin, Niacin, Choline Chloride, Vitamin B12 Supplement, Pyridoxine Hydrochloride, Biotin, Folic Acid, Ascorbic Acid (Vitamin C), L-Lysine Monohydrochloride, DL-Methionine, Potassium Chloride, Sodium Bicarbonate, Manganous Oxide, Ferrous Sulfate, Copper Oxide, Calcium Iodate, Zinc Oxide, Magnesium Oxide, Dextrose.
Wagner's 57075 Safflower Seed Wild Bird Food, 5-Pound Bag
Wagner's Safflower Seed - Cardinals love it, most squirrels don’t. Wagner's Safflower Seed is a great way to attract the birds you want - Cardinals, Chickadees, Titmice, Grosbeaks - and discourage the "feeder hogs", like Grackles and Starlings, that keep them away. And best of all, squirrels generally don’t like the bitter taste so they will stay away as well. If you have unwanted birds and squirrels crowding out your songbirds we recommend gradually filling your feeder with Wagner’s Safflower Seed for a period of time, then gradually mixing in your favorite Wagner’s Premium Wild Bird Food. Wagner’s Safflower Seed is truly a premium, high value seed not found in ordinary blends. So give the Cardinals their favorite seed and keep the pests away at the same time, with Wagner’s Safflower Seed. Trust your backyard birds to the experts at Wagner’s.
