description:
Wild Delight Deck, Porch N' Patio No Waste Bird Food, 5 lb
Wild Delight Deck, Porch N' Patio is an elite, zero-waste wild bird food blended to attract the most desired outdoor pets and give you the cleanest feeding experience available for your outdoor living areas.
Primary Wild Bird Species Attracted: All Songbirds, Cardinals, Grosbeaks, Finches, Jays, Nuthatches and other outdoor pets.
Ingredients: Sunflower Kernels, Peanuts, Pistachios, Hulled Pumpkin Seed, Vitamin A Supplement, Vitamin D-3 Supplement, Vitamin E Supplement, Menadione Sodium Bisulfite Complex, Thiamine Mononitrate, Riboflavin, Niacin, Choline Chloride, Vitamin B12 Supplement, Pyridoxine Hydrochloride, Biotin, Folic Acid, Ascorbic Acid (Vitamin C), L-Lysine Monohydrochloride, DL-Methionine, Potassium Chloride, Sodium Bicarbonate, Manganous Oxide, Ferrous Sulfate, Copper Oxide, Calcium Iodate, Zinc Oxide, Magnesium Oxide, Dextrose, Artificial Flavor.
Wagner's 57075 Safflower Seed Wild Bird Food, 5-Pound Bag
Wagner's Safflower Seed - Cardinals love it, most squirrels don’t. Wagner's Safflower Seed is a great way to attract the birds you want - Cardinals, Chickadees, Titmice, Grosbeaks - and discourage the "feeder hogs", like Grackles and Starlings, that keep them away. And best of all, squirrels generally don’t like the bitter taste so they will stay away as well. If you have unwanted birds and squirrels crowding out your songbirds we recommend gradually filling your feeder with Wagner’s Safflower Seed for a period of time, then gradually mixing in your favorite Wagner’s Premium Wild Bird Food. Wagner’s Safflower Seed is truly a premium, high value seed not found in ordinary blends. So give the Cardinals their favorite seed and keep the pests away at the same time, with Wagner’s Safflower Seed. Trust your backyard birds to the experts at Wagner’s.

description:
FEED OUTDOOR WILDLIFE YEAR-ROUND: We only sell the freshest, unsalted, raw Virginia peanuts removed from the shell and from the most current peanut crop available. Peanuts are a high energy food source and a great supplement to the diets of many wild animals. Wakefield peanuts are packed with proteins and essential fatty acids that are perfect post-rut, when your backyard pals are worn down and need to pack on some weight.
PERFECT FOR BIRD & ANIMAL WATCHING: Many different types of birds and animals are attracted to Wakefield Virginia peanuts. Place a handful of peanuts in your Wakefield Bird/Squirrel Peanut Feeder, or simply toss them in your yard to attract squirrels, birds, chipmunks, ducks, geese, raccoons, deer, and other outdoor wildlife. Bird types attracted to our peanuts include Blue Jays, Scrub Jays, Stellar Jays, Cardinals, Ravens, Pigeons, Woodpeckers, Parrots, Doves, Magpies, Bluebirds and many more!
ANIMAL-GRADE ONLY: These shelled peanuts are meant for animal consumption only. They are rich in proteins and essential fatty acids, and provide a delicious taste that wildlife is sure to enjoy. We recommend roasting or boiling them before feeding.
STORAGE OF RAW PEANUTS: To maintain best quality, store peanuts in a cool, dry place. For short term storage (a few days) keep at or below 60 F; for extended storage keep at 40 F or below (Peanuts keep fresh indefinitely stored in a tightly closed container in the freezer)
WE STAND BEHIND OUR PRODUCTS: At the Wakefield Peanut Company, we let our products do the talking. This is reflected in our quality and in our reviews, which you can view by scrolling to the bottom of this page. We do our absolute best to satisfy every customer, so if you ever have any issues with an order, please reach out to us and well be happy to make it right. If you want to attract wildlife to your backyard, Wakefield Virginia Peanuts are the way to go.

description: Niger (pronounced "ni-jer") Seed, often mistakenly called Thistle Seed, is a favorite of beautiful wild finches like the American Goldfinch. Imported from Africa and sterilized upon entry to prevent germination, this special seed is a great source of energy due to its high oil content. When served straight, it is best used in a specifically designed tubular feeder, like the Nifty NigerTM feeder, or "thistle sock" with small holes where it can be economically dispensed. Ingredients: Niger Seed

Trusted by backyard birding enthusiasts and experts at Wagner's to attract the maximum number of wild birds

description:
Attract beautiful species of bird like Blue Jays, Woodpeckers, and even cute little Chipmunks with Desert Valley Supply In-Shell Peanuts

Blue Jays

Blue jays like peanuts because they are a high-energy food source that is rich in protein and fat. This provides them with essential nutrients for survival, especially during the colder months when natural food sources may be scarce. Some birders have noted that peanuts don't last very long in their backyard because bluejays are quick to come to scoop them up, sometimes two at a time! Blue Jays have also been known to bury peanuts and come back to them later.

Woodpeckers

Several woodpecker species, including red-bellied woodpeckers and downy woodpeckers, enjoy peanuts in the shell. They often wedge the peanut into a tree crevice to hold it in place while they peck it open, fascinating behavior to observe.

Chipmunks

Chipmunks are natural hoarders and foragers. The act of gnawing through the shell to reach the peanut inside stimulates their innate foraging instincts, making the experience rewarding.

Cracking the Code: Attract Backyard Birds with In-Shell Peanuts!

Peanuts are packed with protein, healthy fats, and essential nutrients that birds need for energy and overall health. Foraging for in-shell peanuts provides birds with a stimulating and rewarding activity, keeping them entertained and engaged.

Desert Valley Supply Company Values

We pride ourselves on providing the highest quality in-shell peanuts you can buy. We understand how it feels to watch these amazing birds from the comfort of your home and care deeply about giving your birds seeds that are free of contaminants and waste. We know you will love all of our products. If for any reason our products do not meet your expectations you can return your product, no questions asked! We are confident that you will be fully satisfied with your purchase and stand behind that. We want you to enjoy our products and the birds they bring. We hope to gain your confidence and trust in our brand.

Family Owned and Hand Packed In-Shell Peanuts

Desert Valley Supply is a family-owned and operated business. Our family has been in the bird seed business for over 20 years and is proud to be your go-to brand for all your bird seed needs. Hand packing your in-shell peanuts means we are inspecting the peanuts ourselves, by hand, to ensure you are getting the best batch of peanuts available. We care a lot about birds and we care even more about our customers. Hand packing in-shell peanuts is time-consuming and tedious but we consider it a labor of love!

description:
About this item

Attracts a Variety of Birds: Safflower seeds are known to attract a diverse range of wild birds, including cardinals, chickadees, titmice, and more. Many bird enthusiasts appreciate safflower seeds for the variety of species they can attract to backyard feeders.
High in Nutrition: Safflower seeds are a nutritious option for wild birds, providing essential nutrients such as fats and proteins. These nutrients are crucial for the health and well-being of birds, especially during colder months when food sources may be scarce.
Shell Thickness Deters Pests: Safflower seeds have a thicker shell compared to some other birdseed types. This can be beneficial in deterring pests and preventing the seeds from sprouting and creating unwanted plants around your feeding area.
Ideal for Selective Birds: Some bird species, like cardinals, are known to favor safflower seeds over other options. If you want to attract specific types of birds to your backyard, offering safflower seeds can be a strategic choice.
Unappealing to Squirrels: One notable advantage of safflower seeds is that they are less attractive to squirrels compared to other birdseed varieties. This can help minimize issues with squirrels raiding bird feeders and allows birds to enjoy the seeds without competition.

About this item

Shelled whole peanuts are more nutritious than peanut hearts because the more a seed is chopped or cut, the more surface area exposed to air which cause a loss of nutrients and leads to quicker spoilage.
Super high fat content for quick energy to help birds survive in the wild.
No added synthetics, chemicals, or artificial flavors.
Works well in all feeder types including platform feeders, squirrel feeders, Cole's Terrific TubeTM, Mighty MeshTM, and Bountiful BowlTM.
Both birds and critters eat Raw Peanuts - titmice, nuthatches, jays, chickadees, Pyrrhuloxia, wrens, and woodpeckers. Plus, chipmunks, squirrels and deer!

About this item

BLUE SEAL WILD BIRD FEED: Blue Seal Sing Along Wild Bird Seed is a balanced blend without fillers, perfect for ground feeders.

Entertainment for Nature Enthusiasts: Backyard Seeds Raw Peanuts in The Shell turn your backyard into a haven for nature enthusiasts. Enjoy the sights and sounds of colorful birds and playful squirrels while providing a wholesome treat that enhances your connection with wildlife.

description:
About this item

FRESH NATURAL unsalted shelled Virginia peanuts from the most current peanut crop available to ensure freshness
ATTRACT WILDLIFE such as squirrels, birds, chipmunks, chickens, ducks, geese, raccoons, deer, and other outdoor wildlife. Bird types attracted to our peanuts include Blue Jays, Scrub Jays, Stellar Jays, Cardinals, Ravens, Pigeons, Woodpeckers, Parrots, Doves, Magpies and many more!
PERFECT FOR BIRD AND ANIMAL WATCHING Many different types of birds are attracted to Wakefield Virginia peanuts. Leave the peanuts in your bird feeder or toss them in the yard to experience the feeding frenzy!
HIGH ENERGY food source with protein and essential fatty acids; perfect for animals post-rut, when they are worn down and need to pack on some weight. Can be fed to wildlife year-round.
NOT FOR HUMAN CONSUMPTION: We recommend to roast or boil before feeding to wildlife; PEANUTS MAY VARY IN SIZE, SHAPE, COLOR and CONSISTENCY. Nuts may still have the skin on them. To maintain best eating quality, store peanuts in a cool, dry place. For short term storage (a few days) keep at or below 60 F; for extended storage keep at 40 F or below (Peanuts keep fresh indefinitely stored in a tightly closed container in the freezer)

description:
About this item

Nutra-Saff Golden Safflower Seed is a hybrid seed cultivated to be without the hard outer shell (no mess!)
Popular for its bitter taste; disliked by squirrels but loved by songbirds!
Will attract a diverse range of songbirds and other wild bird species: Cardinal, Grosbeaks, Finches & Chickadees
For use in any hopper, platform, or tube wild bird feeders
Iowa-based, family-owned and managed Des Moines Feed Co. has been in the wild bird feed industry since 1944. For over 70 years, they've produced energy-rich gourmet mixes to meet the unique needs of wild bird species, a commitment perfectly captured in their mission, "our business is truly for the birds."

description:
About this item

🦆Feeding ducks, geese, chickens, sparrows & many other birds can be fun with this natural, energy packed snack!
🐤Cracked corn will attract wild birds like Jays, Titmouses, Nuthatches, Sparrows and junco to your backyard.
🌽Cracked corn is a classic farm feed that provides wildlife great fiber, carbohydrates, vitamins, and protein for their demanding dietary needs.
🚫🍞Bread is extremely unhealthy to feed to geese and ducks! Crack corn is a great alternative.
🌽Cracked corn can be placed in outdoor feeders or sprinkled on the ground.
🐿Other wildlife, like chipmunks and squirrels, will snack on cracked corn. Use as a preventative for squirrels as they are distracted by a separate feeding station away from wild bird feeders!
🇺🇸 Valley Farms Wild Bird Food is Made in the USA by a small family owned and operated business.

description:
About this item

BLUE SEAL FEEDS & SEEDS: Blue Seal Feeds & Seeds Sunflower Chips have a pre-removed hull, making this and energy efficient bird seed. Perfect for Finches and other small-billed birds.
INCREASED SURVIVAL RATES: Survival rates were 38% higher in areas where bird feeders were present. Birds at sites with feeders have less stress than birds at sites without feeders.
ATTRACTS A WIDE VARIETY OF WILD BIRDS: Finches, Black-Capped Chickadees, Black-Headed Grosbeaks, Carolina Wrens, Hairy Woodpeckers, White-Throated Sparrows
INGREDIENTS: Sunflower chips
TIPS FOR ATTRACTING WILD BIRDS: Birds will frequent your feeders more if you provide a consistent reliable source of feed. Setting out a bird bath and providing clean, fresh water will also attract birds not normally drawn to feeders.

description:
Proudly MADE IN THE USA!
Birdie Banquet Bird Seed Large 4" Cylinder
Invite your Feathered Friends to a Fabulous Feast of a blend of mealworms, pecans, sunflower hearts, raisins and cranberries. They will LOVE it! Attracting an amazing variety of wild birds, the Birdie Banquet Blend is sure to leave your Feathered Friends Full.
Practical & Easy to Use
Easily hang with included net or any seed cylinder hanger.
Long Lasting!
Generous size means this Seed Cylinder will last for days and days, no more running out to refill the feeders constantly. It can't be kicked all over the place like lose seed can. Large size lasts a long time and attracts loads of birds. No waste, no mess, never melt. Each cylinder is 4 × 4 × 7.75 in. and is a LARGE 1lbs. 5oz.
A Healthy Diet for your Feathered Friends
An amazing variety of birds visit these Seed Cylinders! In addition to the regular feeder birds such as;

Bluebirds
Cardinals
Chickadees
Woodpeckers
Nuthatches
Finches
Titmice

We have reports of various warblers, wrens, kinglets, blue buntings, mockingbirds, and others eating these Seed Bells. What makes this product special is the formula; a fantastic blend of mealworms (because you know birds LOVE worms!), almonds, sunflower chips, walnuts and papaya - and MORE. You will see the quality and the dramatic results in your own yard.

No Waste or Mess

Quality ingredients means these seed cylinders attract birds much more quickly than suet and without the problem of melting in the summer heat. Great for year-round bird feeding!

description:
About this item

BLUE SEAL FEEDS & SEEDS: Blue Seal Feeds & Seeds Nyjer Seed is an excellent source of energy and highly attractive to finches. Nyjer Seed is derived from sunflower plants and will not produce thistles.
INCREASED SURVIVAL RATES: Survival rates were 38% higher in areas where bird feeders were present. Birds at sites with feeders have less stress than birds at sites without feeders.
ATTRACTS A WIDE VARIETY OF WILD BIRDS: Finches, Dark-Eyed Juncos, and Mourning Doves
INGREDIENTS: Nyjer Seed
TIPS FOR ATTRACTING WILD BIRDS: Birds will frequent your feeders more if you provide a consistent reliable source of feed. Setting out a bird bath and providing clean, fresh water will also attract birds not normally drawn to feeders.

description:
Wagner’s Cardinal Blend

Wagner's Cardinal blend is formulated to attract Cardinals and other songbirds. A combination of Cardinals’ favorite seeds create this tempting feast - safflower, black oil sunflower and striped sunflower seeds. This mixture of high oil content seeds provides the necessary energy needed to nourish these brilliantly colored birds and squirrels don’t like safflower seeds. The Cardinal is one of America's favorite feeder birds, so enjoy the sights and sounds of the beautiful Cardinals and other songbirds that Wagner’s Cardinal Blend is sure to attract to your backyard. Trust your backyard birds to the experts at Wagner’s.

Bird Feeding Fundamentals - When Feeding Wild Birds, There Are 4 Keys To a Successful Program

Food

Provide different types of food to attract more variety of birds. Sunflower is a great seed that many species love. Higher quality mixes attract more birds. Keep feeders full so birds will continue to visit.

Feeders

Provide a variety of feeders to attract the greatest variety of birds. Use hoppers and tube feeders for Sunflower and mixes. Use Finch feeders for Nyjer and Finch mixes. Platform feeders will accommodate ground feeding birds.

Water

Provide a shallow water source (2 inch-3 inch deep) so birds can bathe and drink. Water also attracts birds that feeding stations alone cannot, such as ones that feed on insects alone.

Location

Place feeders in locations already frequented by birds. Place by shrubs and/or trees to offer protection.

FAQ's

Where should I locate my feeder to attract the most birds?

Make sure that your feeder is close to natural shelter such as trees and shrubs to provide protection for your birds, but be careful not to make it too convenient for squirrels. Also, place it in a location so that you can enjoy watching the activities of your feathered friends.

Should I feed the birds year-round?

Yes, birds need food year-round, so it is best to keep bird feeders full all year. Birds have a high metabolism and need to continually eat. Birds nest from late winter through late summer and during these months there is not an abundance of natural foods, so they need additional food for breeding and raising their young.

What is the best bird food?

Oil Sunflower Seed is one of the best seeds to have in a wild bird food mix. It is popular with a large number of species and is easy to feed in a variety of feeder styles. Wagner's blends provide a wide selection of seed choices that will attract a largest variety of birds to the backyard feeder. Wagner's has the mixes that will attract the species you want and will fit any budget.

Wagner’s Nyjer Seed Bird Food

Wagner's Nyjer Seed is the absolute favorite of Finches, such as the American Goldfinch, House Finch, Purple Finch, Pine Siskin and other small songbirds. This tiny delicacy is used in finch feeders which have smaller holes and tiny perches - perfect for the Finches but discouraging to larger birds. Wagner’s Nyjer Seed is the perfect choice for nurturing Finches with its high fat and protein content. Sometimes referred to as "black gold," nyjer seed may seem more expensive than some premium blends, it actually lasts longer as it packs an incredible 150,000 seeds per pound and the seeds create no waste, no mess, no growth and more visits to your feeder. Fill your Finch feeder with Wagner’s Nyjer Seed and enjoy the antics of these beautiful and sociable birds in your backyard. Trust your backyard birds to the experts at Wagner’s.

description:
About this item

BLUE SEAL FEEDS & SEEDS: Blue Seal Feeds & Seeds Whole Corn Wild Animal and Bird Feed attracts squirrels and birds alike, and provides diversity to your local small wild-life's diet.
INCREASED SURVIVAL RATES: Survival rates were 38% higher in areas where bird feeders were present. Birds at sites with feeders have less stress than birds at sites without feeders.
ATTRACTS A WIDE VARIETY OF WILD LIFE: Chipmunks and Squirrels. Turkeys, Quails, Cardinals, Grosbeaks.
INGREDIENTS: Whole Corn
TIPS FOR ATTRACTING WILD BIRDS: Birds will frequent your feeders more if you provide a consistent reliable source of feed. Setting out a bird bath and providing clean, fresh water will also attract birds not normally drawn to feeders.

description:
Wild Delight Deck, Porch N' Patio No Waste Bird Food, 5 lb
Wild Delight Deck, Porch N' Patio is an elite, zero-waste wild bird food blended to attract the most desired outdoor pets and give you the cleanest feeding experience available for your outdoor living areas.
Primary Wild Bird Species Attracted: All Songbirds, Cardinals, Grosbeaks, Finches, Jays, Nuthatches and other outdoor pets.
Ingredients: Sunflower Kernels, Peanuts, Pistachios, Hulled Pumpkin Seed, Vitamin A Supplement, Vitamin D-3 Supplement, Vitamin E Supplement, Menadione Sodium Bisulfite Complex, Thiamine Mononitrate, Riboflavin, Niacin, Choline Chloride, Vitamin B12 Supplement, Pyridoxine Hydrochloride, Biotin, Folic Acid, Ascorbic Acid (Vitamin C), L-Lysine Monohydrochloride, DL-Methionine, Potassium Chloride, Sodium Bicarbonate, Manganous Oxide, Ferrous Sulfate, Copper Oxide, Calcium Iodate, Zinc Oxide, Magnesium Oxide, Dextrose, Artificial Flavor.
Wagner's 13008 Deluxe Wild Bird Food, 10 lb Bag
Wagner’s Deluxe Wild Bird Food Blend with sunflower and general purpose seeds offers the backyard enthusiast a value plus moderately priced food that is the real deal! Deluxe Blend can be used in all types of feeders as well as being a great mix to attract those wonderful ground feeding birds. You’ll get all the regular customers like Cardinals, Chickadees and Finches as well as other indigenous backyard visitors. Trust your backyard birds to the experts at Wagner’s.

description:
About this item

🐤 Nyjer seed is readily eaten by Finches, Pine Siskin, Redpoll and other great wild birds. Finch Seed for Outside Feeders.
🌱 Most small-billed birds prefer this oil-type black seed.
🪴 Add a platform beneath feeders to catch this tiny seed for less waste.
🐤 Use a finch feeder with small ports or a finch sock for them to cling on!
🪻Nyjer is also called Thistle however the Thistle is classified as a different plant species. Finches will feed on thistle and use thistledown to construct their nests.
🌱 Valley Farms Seed is Vacuum cleaned and always fresh.
🗽 Made in the USA by a family owned and operated small business.

description: The blend includes a variety of nutrient-rich ingredients such as sunflower kernels, safflower seeds, and other quality grains. These ingredients provide essential nutrients, including proteins, fats, and carbohydrates, to support the health and vitality of wild birds year-round. Lyric Fine Tunes Wild Bird Food is formulated to attract a wide range of bird species, making it a versatile choice for bird enthusiasts. Whether you're hoping to attract finches, cardinals, chickadees, or sparrows, this premium blend creates an irresistible feast that will bring a colorful assortment of birds to your backyard. This bird food blend is suitable for year-round feeding, providing a consistent food source for birds during all seasons. Whether it's the cold winter months or the active breeding season in spring and summer, Lyric Fine Tunes Wild Bird Food offers a reliable and nutritious option for your avian visitors. Each case includes eight 5-pound bags of Lyric Fine Tunes Wild Bird Food, ensuring a convenient and ample supply to keep your bird feeders well-stocked. description:
Wagner's 82042 Songbird Banquet Wild Bird Food, 5-Pound Bag
Trust your backyard birds to the experts at Wagner’s. Songbird Banquet is formulated to attract a wide variety of songbirds and keep them coming back to the feeder. Bird favorites-black oil and striped sunflower, peanuts, safflower and tree nuts fill this mix with all natural nutrition. Wagner’s Gourmet series blends contain no fillers. That equals better value for you and healthier food for your wild birds.
Wagner's 62046 Backyard Wildlife Food, 8-Pound Bag, 8 lb
Wagner's Backyard Wildlife Food is a tasty treat for squirrels, rabbits and other backyard friends. Wagner’s Backyard Wildlife Food offers black oil sunflower seeds, striped sunflower seeds, whole peanuts, peanut kernels, and whole corn for all your backyard wildlife friends. Squirrels, rabbits and other cute critters will enjoy this tasty treat. Many people feed Wagner’s Backyard Wildlife Food separately from their regular bird feeding area, in a platform feeder or sprinkled on the ground, so that playful squirrels and other small animals have their own place to eat - diverting them from the bird feeders. Use Wagner’s Backyard Wildlife food and enjoy that "close to nature" feeling that comes with feeding your own backyard wildlife. Trust your backyard birds to the experts at Wagner’s.

description:
About this item

You will receive (1) 15-pound bag with your order. This is a high-quality bird food formulated with 100% genuine Nyjer seed.
Nyjer, a small, thin oilseed, is highly nutritious and provides an excellent source of energy for active birds. Its high oil and fat content make it particularly favored by small birds like finches and chickadees.
It can be fed on its own or blended with other wild bird seed and is best used in feeders with ports designed specifically for Nyjer seed to avoid spillage and waste. Nyjer seed is not desired by nuisance birds, squirrels or chipmunks.
Packaged in a barrier bag, sealed air tight and CO2 flushed to preserve optimal freshness. Packaging is in the process of being updated and may vary.
Attracts: American Goldfinches, House Finches, Purple Finches, Black-capped Chickadees, Dark-eyed Juncos, Common Redpolls and Mourning Doves.

description:
Wagner’s Backyard Wildlife Food

Wagner's Backyard Wildlife Food is a tasty treat for squirrels, rabbits and other backyard friends. Wagner’s Backyard Wildlife Food offers black oil sunflower seeds, striped sunflower seeds, whole peanuts, peanut kernels, and whole corn for all your backyard wildlife friends. Squirrels, rabbits and other cute critters will enjoy this tasty treat. Many people feed Wagner’s Backyard Wildlife Food separately from their regular bird feeding area, in a platform feeder or sprinkled on the ground, so that playful squirrels and other small animals have their own place to eat - diverting them from the bird feeders. Use Wagner’s Backyard Wildlife food and enjoy that "close to nature" feeling that comes with feeding your own backyard wildlife. Trust your backyard birds to the experts at Wagner’s.

Bird Feeding Fundamentals - When Feeding Wild Birds, There Are 4 Keys To a Successful Program

Food

Provide different types of food to attract more variety of birds. Sunflower is a great seed that many species love. Higher quality mixes attract more birds. Keep feeders full so birds will continue to visit.

Feeders

Provide a variety of feeders to attract the greatest variety of birds. Use hoppers and tube feeders for Sunflower and mixes. Use Finch feeders for Nyjer and Finch mixes. Platform feeders will accommodate ground feeding birds.

Water

Provide a shallow water source (2 inch-3 inch deep) so birds can bathe and drink. Water also attracts birds that feeding stations alone cannot, such as ones that feed on insects alone.

Location

Place feeders in locations already frequented by birds. Place by shrubs and/or trees to offer protection.

FAQ's

Where should I locate my feeder to attract the most birds?

Make sure that your feeder is close to natural shelter such as trees and shrubs to provide protection for your birds, but be careful not to make it too convenient for squirrels. Also, place it in a location so that you can enjoy watching the activities of your feathered friends.

Should I feed the birds year-round?

Yes, birds need food year-round, so it is best to keep bird feeders full all year. Birds have a high metabolism and need to continually eat. Birds nest from late winter through late summer and during these months there is not an abundance of natural foods, so they need additional food for breeding and raising their young.

What is the best bird food?

Oil Sunflower Seed is one of the best seeds to have in a wild bird food mix. It is popular with a large number of species and is easy to feed in a variety of feeder styles. Wagner's blends provide a wide selection of seed choices that will attract a largest variety of birds to the backyard feeder. Wagner's has the mixes that will attract the species you want and will fit any budget.

Wagner’s Cracked Corn

Our Wagner's Cracked Corn is enjoyed by a variety of ground feeding birds such as Blue Jays, Cardinals, Doves, Juncos, Quail, Pheasants, Ducks and Grouse. Rabbits, chipmunks and other playful wildlife will be attracted as well. It can be fed on its own or mixed with other seed. Many people feed cracked corn separately from their regular bird feeding area so that playful squirrels and other small animals have their own place to eat - diverting them from eating at your bird feeders. Sprinkle some on the ground where it is easily accessible by both birds and animals. Use Wagner’s Cracked Corn and enjoy that "close to nature" feeling that comes with feeding your own backyard wildlife. Trust your backyard birds to the experts at Wagner’s.

description:
About this item

Striped sunflower seeds, a close relative of black-oil sunflower seeds, offer unique benefits for bird feeding.
Their larger size and harder shells attract birds with stronger beaks like woodpeckers and jays and also parrots.
These seeds provide a rich source of energy, especially in colder seasons.
Unlike black-oil sunflower seeds, striped sunflower seeds have a distinctive black-and-white striped appearance.
These seeds are rich in energy, making them a valuable food source for birds year-round.
Birds That Enjoy Striped Sunflower Seeds: Woodpeckers, Jays, Grosbeaks, Finches, and specialy parrots.
You can offer striped sunflower seeds in various feeders, including tube feeders, tray feeders, or hopper feeders.

description:
DELUXE BIRD LOVERS BLEND

Will Attract the best variety of birds to your feeders!

ALL THAT NATURE INTENDED

Welcome to the fun-filled world of Nature’s Nuts. Enjoying nature is easy with our NUT-TRICIOUS blend of seeds and nuts. We have searched the world over to bring you the freshest natural ingredients for bird and wildlife feeding. It is our belief that nature provides the best solutions for feeding, so you will never find artificial colors, oils or fillers in our seed. Nature’s Nuts has produced and harvested seed for over thirty years and has used this know-how to provide birders and nature enthusiasts with a premium natural choice in wildlife diets.

DELUXE BIRD LOVERS BLEND - WILD BIRD SEED

Ingredients: Super premium blend of over 50% Sunflower Seed. Includes Pumpkin Seed, Peanuts, Sunflower Hearts, Millet, Corn and Safflower Seed.

Attracts: Chickadees, Nuthatches, Jays, Grosbeaks, Sparrows, and Doves.

Feeder Type: Hopper, Chalet, Tube, Bowl.

NATURE'S NUTS

To turn your backyard into a miniature nature reserve you must provide plenty of quality food, water, and shelter. With the help of Nature’s Nuts you can provide a haven for wildlife, giving your entire family hours of enjoyment, and a respect for nature that will last a lifetime. For a birds-eye-view, place feeders in an area that is easy to watch and accessible to your backyard friends. Make sure this area is close to a bush or tree so that birds can fly into cover, and look around, before feeding. To attract a variety of birds, we recommend one feeder that is suspended or mounted, coupled with a ground-feeding tray. This will keep competition to a minimum between smaller and larger birds. Above all, be patient. Your birds may take a few weeks to locate a new feeder. But rest assured, once they find it, they will be back for more. Winter creates a special demand for a high-energy diet, while spring and early summer finds seeds and nuts in short supply. So stay stocked for your flock!

description:
Wagner's 62046 Backyard Wildlife Food, 8-Pound Bag
Wagner's Backyard Wildlife Food is a tasty treat for squirrels, rabbits and other backyard friends. Wagner’s Backyard Wildlife Food offers black oil sunflower seeds, striped sunflower seeds, whole peanuts, peanut kernels, and whole corn for all your backyard wildlife friends. Squirrels, rabbits and other cute critters will enjoy this tasty treat. Many people feed Wagner’s Backyard Wildlife Food separately from their regular bird feeding area, in a platform feeder or sprinkled on the ground, so that playful squirrels and other small animals have their own place to eat - diverting them from the bird feeders. Use Wagner’s Backyard Wildlife food and enjoy that "close to nature" feeling that comes with feeding your own backyard wildlife. Trust your backyard birds to the experts at Wagner’s.
Wagner's 62032 Cardinal Blend Wild Bird Food, 6-Pound Bag
Wagner's Cardinal blend is formulated to attract Cardinals and other songbirds. A combination of Cardinals’ favorite seeds create this tempting feast - safflower, black oil sunflower and striped sunflower seeds. This mixture of high oil content seeds provides the necessary energy needed to nourish these brilliantly colored birds. An added bonus: squirrels don’t like safflower seeds. The Cardinal is one of America's favorite feeder birds, so enjoy the sights and sounds of the beautiful Cardinals and other songbirds that Wagner’s Cardinal Blend is sure to attract to your backyard. Trust your backyard birds to the experts at Wagner’s.

description:
About this item

Attracts a Variety of Birds: Safflower seeds are known to attract a diverse range of wild birds, including cardinals, chickadees, titmice, and more. Many bird enthusiasts appreciate safflower seeds for the variety of species they can attract to backyard feeders.
High in Nutrition: Safflower seeds are a nutritious option for wild birds, providing essential nutrients such as fats and proteins. These nutrients are crucial for the health and well-being of birds, especially during colder months when food sources may be scarce.
Shell Thickness Deters Pests: Safflower seeds have a thicker shell compared to some other birdseed types. This can be beneficial in deterring pests and preventing the seeds from sprouting and creating unwanted plants around your feeding area.
Ideal for Selective Birds: Some bird species, like cardinals, are known to favor safflower seeds over other options. If you want to attract specific types of birds to your backyard, offering safflower seeds can be a strategic choice.
Unappealing to Squirrels: One notable advantage of safflower seeds is that they are less attractive to squirrels compared to other birdseed varieties. This can help minimize issues with squirrels raiding bird feeders and allows birds to enjoy the seeds without competition.

description:
About this item

DECADES OF WILD BIRD FEEDING: CountryMax is celebrating four decades in business with a special anniversary bird seed blend. We’ve mixed the high-quality ingredients your backyard birds crave into an irresistible combination. The throwback label features original art from our first custom bird seed packaging, plus a trip down memory lane on the back.
ATTRACTS A CROWD: Carefully crafted blend designed to attract a diverse range of bird species to your backyard. rom colorful songbirds to lively finches and woodpeckers, this blend offers something for every avian enthusiast to enjoy.
INGREDIENTS: Ingredients: Black Oil Sunflower Seed, White Millet, Cracked Corn and wheat. 10% Protein, 7% Fat, 11% Fiber
FOR FEEDERS OR GROUND FEEDING: Easy to use – simply fill your bird feeders with the Heritage Mix and watch as birds flock to enjoy.
LEGACY MIX: Join us in celebrating the timeless beauty of nature with Backyard Seeds' 1984 Heritage Mix Bird Seed – where nostalgia meets the wonders of the present, creating unforgettable moments for birdwatchers of all ages.

{ Attract Wildlife } Corn for deer usage and other wildlife uses is a tried and true method that has been used for hundreds of years to effective bring animals to a desired area! Simply put in areas where traffic is and watch them keep coming back for more!
{ Winter Help } Whole Corn deer feed and turkey feed delivers high energy to animals known to lose energy as the weather gets colder. These added carbohydrates are critical in these months!
{ Non-GMO }. Our whole corn is raw, vegan, gluten-free and 100% all-natural. This dried corn option is a great and healthy option for many different wildlife animals!
{ Other Uses } Not only is our dried corn kernels good as turkey and deer bait food or as a corn for squirrels. Our blend is great to be used for corn hole bags, arts and crafts and sensory bins!

description: Millet is a grain that is excellent to grind for flour, bird seed, porridge and beer making. Whole Millet has still has it's thin hull intact and has a high germination rate and is excellent for sprouting, birdseed, animal feed and making millet beer. Whole millet is not a good candidate for grinding for flour, as the hull needs to be removed to make the best flour. Look for Hulled Millet if you have that need. Millet has about the same protein content as wheat (11%) and is high in vitamins and minerals, especially B Vitamins. Millet is usually the main ingredient in most birdseed mixes as it is a softer small seed that can be eaten by all birds.

description:
Fill tube or platform feeders with large seeds easily using this 20 pound bag of No Millet Special Wild Bird Seed Mix. This blend of sunflower seeds, cracked corn, safflower, and milo is great for attracting cardinals, flickers, woodpeckers, and wrens to your sanctuary, offering them the nutrients they need to thrive. The larger seeds wonderfully fill your existing feeders, and the lack of millet diminishes waste. The high concentration of oil in the seed mixture also helps birds keep their feathers dry and warm, particularly during the winter months, for a healthy avian population. Provide food to many bird species with this No Millet Special Wild Bird Seed Mix.
This Wild Bird Seed Mix, No Millet Special, is packaged in a 20 pound bag.
Birds that enjoy this seed: blackbirds, cardinals, chickadees, crows, doves, finches, flickers, goldfinches, grackles, grosbeaks, jays, juncos, mockingbirds, nuthatches, pheasants, pigeons, quail, redpolls, siskins, sparrows, starlings, titmice, towhees, woodpeckers, and wrens
Feeder Options: gazebo, hopper, platform, tube, and window feeders
Ingredients: black oil sunflower seeds, cracked corn, wheat, milo, safflower seeds, striped sunflower seeds
Guaranteed Analysis: minimum crude protein 11%, minimum crude fat 19%, maximum crude fiber 18%

description:
Kaytee Ultra Wild Finch Blend is a mix of four select ingredients designed to attract more finches and is preferred 3-to-1 over Nyjer seed alone*. Since birds identify food with their sense of sight, Kaytee has applied this knowledge of visual attraction to create this custom blend of seeds that will attract more birds to your backyard. Kaytee Ultra Wild Finch Blend does not contain fillers and is ideal for year-round feeding of a variety of wild birds.
*Extensive national field testing has shown our Ultra Wild Finch Blend is preferred 3 out of 4 times when compared to Nyjer and attracts more birds.
Nyjer is a registered trademark of the Wild Bird Feeding Industry.

Premium wild bird food: Our black oil sunflower bird seed mix is a high-energy food that is popular with many wild bird species, including finches, grosbeaks, chickadees, and nuthatches, songbirds, cardinals. All birds love Black Oil Sunflower Seeds
Attracts beautiful birds: The black oil sunflower seeds in our wild bird food mix are high in fat and protein, making them an excellent source of energy for birds and attracting them to your yard
Great for feeding birds: Our wild bird food is packaged in a convenient resealable bag that makes it easy to feed birds and keep the remaining seed fresh
Nutritious and delicious: Our black oil sunflower bird seed mix contains no fillers and is an excellent source of essential nutrients for wild birds, helping them to thrive and survive
Versatile: Our wild bird food can be used in a variety of bird feeders and feeding stations, including tube feeders, platform feeders, and thistle sock feeders, making it a versatile choice for bird enthusiasts

description:
Wagner's 62067 Deluxe Treat Blend Wild Bird Food, 4 Pound (Pack of 1)
Wagner's Deluxe Treat Wild Bird Food is a deluxe wild bird food with a treat - safflower seed. Wagner’s Deluxe Treat is a quality blend of seeds including black oil sunflower as well as different varieties of safflower seed. This colorful high quality blend will bring all your favorite and beautiful songbirds to your backyard. By offering your backyard birds a larger quantity of the seeds they enjoy, you will be rewarded with many different types of songbirds that will come to your feeders. Cardinals, Chickadees, Titmice, Nuthatches and Jays will be frequent visitors to your backyard. This blend works well in all types of feeders. Trust your backyard birds to the experts at Wagner’s.
More Birds 12-Inch Extension Steel Hook, Windchimes
Hang your bird feeder from most any small tree branch with the More Birds 12 Inch Extension Hook. Not just for bird feeders, our extension hook can hang most anything from hummingbird feeders, plants, windchimes, lanterns, and other outdoor decor. A stolid steel construction and powder-coated finish create a durable weather-resistant hook. Effortlessly fit the hook over smaller tree branches turning hard-to-reach branches into convenient natyral hanging a space. Better for Birds, Better for You Classic Brands has more than 100 years of management and design experience in the birding industry and is comprised of individuals who are passionate about birds. Classic Brands takes time and considers developing quality birding products that bring more birds and more joy into your yard. Part of the Classic Brands family, More Birds offers high-quality feeders and accessories for hummingbirds and orioles. Classic Brands develops innovative, quality products that are better for the birds and better for you. We conduct research to understand what birders want, and it designs its products with the birds’ needs in mind too.

description:
About this item

White proso millet, also known as white millet or proso millet, is a favorite among various bird species.
t’s a small, round, cream-colored seed about the size of the head of a pin. Many ground-feeding birds are drawn to millet due to its high protein content.
Attracts Birds: White proso millet is a favorite among various bird species, including quail, migratory native American sparrows, doves, towhees, juncos, and cardinals.
Exotic Birds: White Proso Millet is also popular for feeding exotic birds, including finches.
We made sure that it is safe enough to be consumed by all types of birds and that it wouldn't hard your love ones

description: 6 Pack Bundle of 62 oz. Seed Cylinders! This 62 oz. seed cylinder is excellent for squirrel prone areas, as squirrels generally don't like safflower. These cylinders are preferred by cardinals, grosbeaks and more, where grackles, sparrows and starlings generally don't like safflower. The golden safflower seed is softer than traditional safflower, so will attract a great number of birds. Golden Safflower is different than your normal safflower seed because its higher in oil content, higher in protein, and higher in fat - Making it more desirable to birds! This Mr. Bird cylinder will perform best when kept dry. Attracts birds much more quickly than suet and without the problem of melting in the summer heat. Great for year-round bird feeding.

description:
About this item

Attracts a Variety of Birds: Safflower seeds are known to attract a diverse range of wild birds, including cardinals, chickadees, titmice, and more. Many bird enthusiasts appreciate safflower seeds for the variety of species they can attract to backyard feeders.
High in Nutrition: Safflower seeds are a nutritious option for wild birds, providing essential nutrients such as fats and proteins. These nutrients are crucial for the health and well-being of birds, especially during colder months when food sources may be scarce.
Shell Thickness Deters Pests: Safflower seeds have a thicker shell compared to some other birdseed types. This can be beneficial in deterring pests and preventing the seeds from sprouting and creating unwanted plants around your feeding area.
Ideal for Selective Birds: Some bird species, like cardinals, are known to favor safflower seeds over other options. If you want to attract specific types of birds to your backyard, offering safflower seeds can be a strategic choice.
Unappealing to Squirrels: One notable advantage of safflower seeds is that they are less attractive to squirrels compared to other birdseed varieties. This can help minimize issues with squirrels raiding bird feeders and allows birds to enjoy the seeds without competition.

description:
Wagner's 18542 Cracked Corn Wild Bird Food, 10-Pound Bag
Our Wagner's Cracked Corn is enjoyed by a variety of ground feeding birds such as Blue Jays, Cardinals, Doves, Juncos, Quail, Pheasants, Ducks and Grouse. Rabbits, chipmunks and other playful wildlife will be attracted as well. It can be fed on its own or mixed with other seed. Many people feed cracked corn separately from their regular bird feeding area so that playful squirrels and other small animals have their own place to eat - diverting them from eating at your bird feeders. Sprinkle some on the ground where it is easily accessible by both birds and animals. Use Wagner’s Cracked Corn and enjoy that "close to nature" feeling that comes with feeding your own backyard wildlife. Trust your backyard birds to the experts at Wagner’s.
Wagner's 53002 Farmer's Delight Wild Bird Food with Cherry Flavor, 10-Pound Bag
Wagner's Farmer's Delight Wild Bird Food is a clean blend of millet, milo, cracked corn and sunflower. This general purpose mix is great for attracting all birds, especially ground feeders. Great for birders who wish for an economical option. Trust your backyard birds to the experts at Wagner's.

description:
Introducing our premium Finch Bird Seed, the ultimate solution for attracting and nourishing a wide variety of wild finch species to your outside feeders. Our carefully crafted blend of niger seeds, nyjer seed, thistle seed, safflower bird seed, and other small bird seeds provides the perfect nutrition for your feathered friends. Our wild finch bird seed for outside feeders is designed to meet the dietary needs of finches, parakeets, parrots, cockatiels, and other small birds, ensuring they stay healthy and happy in your outdoor space.

Our no waste bird seeds for outside wild birds come in a convenient 25 and 10 lb bag, making it easy to fill your finch feeder, thistle bird feeder, or any other bird feeders you have in your garden. The non-germinating formula of our bird food for outside wild birds ensures that there is no mess left behind, allowing you to enjoy the beauty of your visiting finches without any hassle. Our wild bird seed, including the goldfinch bird seed and yellow finch bird seed, is compatible with all types of bird feeders, including niger seed bird feeders for outside. So, whether you're looking for bird seed for outside feeders, hummingbird food, or mealworms for wild birds, our Finch Bird Seed blend has you covered. Don't miss out on the opportunity to provide the best comida para pajaros to your outdoor bird friends with our Finch Bird Seed. Order now and enjoy the sight of beautiful, healthy wild birds in your garden!

INCREASED SURVIVAL RATES: Survival rates were 38% higher in areas where bird feeders were present. Birds at sites with feeders have less stress than birds at sites without feeders.

description: Includes: one (1) 5-pound bag of premium wild bird seed made from non-GMO ingredients. Des Moines Feed Co. Fruit & Nut wild bird seed is an all-natural, nutrient-rich blend of birds favorite seeds. It contains eight (8) different fruits and a rich variety of peanuts and tree nuts. Enriched with calcium for healthier year-round feeding. It will attract a diverse range of songbirds and other species: Blue Jay, Cardinal, Chickadees, House Finch, Purple Finch, Robin, Tufted Titmouse, White-breasted Nuthatch, and Woodpeckers. Air-cleaned, Non-GMO Ingredients include: Shelled Peanuts, Sunflower Seed, Hulled Sunflower, Safflower Seed, Chopped Mixed Tree Nuts, Oat Groats, Calcium Carbonate, Dried Pitted Cherries, Dried Apricot Dices, Dried Nectarine Dices, Dried Apple Dices, Dried Pluots Dices, Dried Peach Dices, Raisins, Dried Cranberry Dices. Guaranteed Analysis: Crude Fat (Min) 38.0%; Crude Fiber (Max) 20.0%; Moisture (Max) 15.0%; Crude Protein (Min) 18.0%. What is Des Moines Feed Co.? Iowa-based, family-owned and managed Des Moines Feed Co. has been in the wild bird feed industry since 1944. For over 70 years, they've produced energy-rich gourmet mixes that include peanut pickouts, peanut hearts, almonds and other tree nuts to meet the unique needs of wild bird species from cardinals to woodpeckers to pigeons and beyond! Their blends of high-quality seeds are cleaned, graded and air-aspirated. No artificial flavoring is used. Their fruit is real fruit. No insecticides, pesticides or heat treatments are used. All seeds and grains are non-GMO and tested in a third-party laboratory for quality control. Des Moines combined experience and expertise in bird feeding and commitment to wild birds high-quality nutrition is encapsulated in their mission, "our business is truly for the birds."

description: 2 Pack Bundle of 72 oz. Seed Cylinders! This 100% 72 oz. seed cylinder is excellent for squirrel prone areas, as squirrels generally don't like safflower. These cylinders are preferred by cardinals, grosbeaks and more, where grackles, sparrows and starlings generally don't like safflower. The golden safflower seed is softer than traditional safflower, so will attract a great number of birds. Golden Safflower is different than your normal safflower seed because its higher in oil content, higher in protein, and higher in fat - Making it more desirable to birds! This Mr. Bird cylinder will perform best when kept dry. Attracts birds much more quickly than suet and without the problem of melting in the summer heat. Great for year-round bird feeding.

description:
Wagner's 62059 Greatest Variety Blend Wild Bird Food, 16-Pound Bag
Wagner's Greatest Variety is our ultimate food for the greatest variety of birds. Just like people, different birds have different food preferences which is why we have included the greatest variety of bird food ingredients in this product. With these 11 carefully selected bird food ingredients, we guarantee that Wagner’s Greatest Variety will attract all your favorite songbirds to your feeder. The black oil sunflower, striped sunflower and sunflower chips, which together represent over 40% of the blend are the top food choice for the greatest number of wild bird species. By offering sunflower seeds in different sizes, both hulled and unhulled, birds of various sizes can find their favorite food. White millet, red millet, cracked corn, and red milo will attract a variety of ground feeders such as Tree Sparrows, Song Sparrows, House Sparrows, Dark-eyed Juncos, and Mourning Doves to your backyard. Nyjer, peanut kernels, canary seed and safflower, will attract specific species of preferred birds ranging from Cardinals, Chickadees and Titmice to Jays, Finches and Woodpeckers. Trust your backyard birds to the experts at Wagner’s.
Wagner's 62032 Cardinal Blend Wild Bird Food, 6-Pound Bag
Wagner's Cardinal blend is formulated to attract Cardinals and other songbirds. A combination of Cardinals’ favorite seeds create this tempting feast - safflower, black oil sunflower and striped sunflower seeds. This mixture of high oil content seeds provides the necessary energy needed to nourish these brilliantly colored birds. An added bonus: squirrels don’t like safflower seeds. The Cardinal is one of America's favorite feeder birds, so enjoy the sights and sounds of the beautiful Cardinals and other songbirds that Wagner’s Cardinal Blend is sure to attract to your backyard. Trust your backyard birds to the experts at Wagner’s.

description: This 20-pound bag of Wagner's Midwest Regional Blend Wild Bird Food paired with a 10-pound bag of Wagner's Cracked Corn Wild Bird Food makes an ideal bird and wildlife feeding bundle. The Midwest Regional Blend contains black oil sunflower, striped sunflower seed, safflower seed and other grains that attract beautiful songbirds like Cardinals, Chickadees, Finches and Blue Jays. Meanwhile, the Cracked Corn attracts ground feeding birds like Blue Jays, Cardinals, Doves, Juncos, Quail, Pheasants, Ducks and Grouse, as well as rabbits, chipmunks and other backyard wildlife. By offering both elevated feeder seed and ground food, this bundle allows you to feed a wide variety of Midwestern birds. The Midwest Regional Blend works well in tube, hopper and platform feeders while the Cracked Corn can be sprinkled on the ground or mixed with other seed. The two complement each other perfectly to bring in more species of birds and wildlife. With the Midwest Regional Blend made up of the seeds Midwest songbirds desire and the Cracked Corn formulating an accessible ground food, this Wagner’s bundle is sure to attract various beautiful perching birds, ground feeding birds and small wildlife to your backyard. It provides a one-two punch to increase activity and biodiversity through quality feeder and ground food.

description:
Proudly MADE IN THE USA!
Birdie Blends Perch Party Bird Seed Large 4" Cylinder
Invite your Feathered Friends to a Fabulous Feast of a blend of premium black oil sunflower, sunflower chips, peanuts, and safflower. They will LOVE it! Attracting an amazing variety of wild birds, the Perch Party Blend is sure to leave your Feathered Friends Full.
All-Season Blend
Attracts a wide variety of feathered friends in every season!
Practical & Easy to Use
Easily hang with any seed cylinder hanger.
Long Lasting!
Generous size means this Seed Cylinder will last for days and days, no more running out to refill the feeders constantly. It can't be kicked all over the place like lose seed can. Large size lasts a long time and attracts loads of birds. No waste, no mess, never melt. Each cylinder is 4 × 4 × 7.75 in. and is a LARGE 1.5 lbs.
A Healthy Diet for your Feathered Friends
An amazing variety of birds visit these Seed Cylinders! In addition to the regular feeder birds such as;

Bluebirds
Cardinals
Chickadees
Woodpeckers
Nuthatches
Finches
Titmice

We have reports of various warblers, wrens, kinglets, blue buntings, mockingbirds, and others eating these cylinders. What makes this product special is the formula; a fantastic blend of premium black oil sunflower, sunflower chips, peanuts, and safflower. You will see the quality and the dramatic results in your own yard.

No Waste or Mess
Quality ingredients means these seed cylinders attract birds much more quickly than suet and without the problem of melting in the summer heat. Great for year-round bird feeding!

description:
Wagner's 76027 Black Oil Sunflower Wild Bird Food, 25-Pound Bag
Wagner's Four Season Sunflower Seed is 100% black oil sunflower seed. Sunflower seed is the favorite seed of most wild birds. It is high in energy and has a thin shell making it easy for all birds to consume. Use tray feeders or hopper feeders to attract sunflower loving songbirds. Cardinals, Chickadees, Finches, Nuthatches, Woodpeckers and much more. Trust your backyard birds to the experts at Wagner’s.
Wagner's 57075 Safflower Seed Wild Bird Food, 5-Pound Bag
Wagner's Safflower Seed - Cardinals love it, most squirrels don’t. Wagner's Safflower Seed is a great way to attract the birds you want - Cardinals, Chickadees, Titmice, Grosbeaks - and discourage the "feeder hogs", like Grackles and Starlings, that keep them away. And best of all, squirrels generally don’t like the bitter taste so they will stay away as well. If you have unwanted birds and squirrels crowding out your songbirds we recommend gradually filling your feeder with Wagner’s Safflower Seed for a period of time, then gradually mixing in your favorite Wagner’s Premium Wild Bird Food. Wagner’s Safflower Seed is truly a premium, high value seed not found in ordinary blends. So give the Cardinals their favorite seed and keep the pests away at the same time, with Wagner’s Safflower Seed. Trust your backyard birds to the experts at Wagner’s.

description:
About this item

DECADES OF WILD BIRD FEEDING: CountryMax is celebrating four decades in business with a special anniversary bird seed blend. We’ve mixed the high-quality ingredients your backyard birds crave into an irresistible combination. The throwback label features original art from our first custom bird seed packaging, plus a trip down memory lane on the back.
ATTRACTS A CROWD: Carefully crafted blend designed to attract a diverse range of bird species to your backyard. rom colorful songbirds to lively finches and woodpeckers, this blend offers something for every avian enthusiast to enjoy.
INGREDIENTS: Ingredients: Black Oil Sunflower Seed, White Millet, Cracked Corn and wheat. 10% Protein, 7% Fat, 11% Fiber
FOR FEEDERS OR GROUND FEEDING: Easy to use – simply fill your bird feeders with the Heritage Mix and watch as birds flock to enjoy.
LEGACY MIX: Join us in celebrating the timeless beauty of nature with Backyard Seeds' 1984 Heritage Mix Bird Seed – where nostalgia meets the wonders of the present, creating unforgettable moments for birdwatchers of all ages.

description:
About this item

Black oil sunflower seeds are a favorite among wild birds.
Black oil sunflower seeds are high in oil and protein, providing essential energy for birds.
Birds that enjoy black oil sunflower seeds include: Finches, Sparrows, Grosbeaks, Towhees, Jays, Chickadees, Nuthatches, Blackbirds, Woodpeckers, Cardinals, Magpies, Juncos, Orioles, Doves.
You can place black oil sunflower seeds on hopper feeders, platform feeders, or trays.
They’re a popular choice for bird feeders because of their high oil content and ease of consumption.

description:
Product Description

Scotts Songbird Selections offer a full line of premium wild bird food products that were developed by ornithologists using only high-quality ingredients and no fillers added. Brings the birds you want…Again and Again!

Amazon.com

Developed by ornithologists after extensive field testing in backyards just like yours, this Scotts Songbird Selections Wild Bird Food Southeastern Bird Blend is a distinct combination of high-quality ingredients including regionally preferred seeds, fruits, and nuts that's formulated to attract MORE desirable and locally-unique bird species that inhabit the region. * This blend is designed to attract Red-Bellied Woodpeckers, Carolina Chickadees, and other unique Southeastern birds.

Red-Bellied Woodpecker. Carolina Chickadee.

It's based on the applied science of feeding behavior and bird vision (birds actually find and choose food based on sight rather than taste), and tested with over 30,000 feeder observations recorded in the Southeast.

The Scotts Southeastern bird blend can be used in hopper, platform, and tube feeders (learn more about types of feeders below). Use in feeders placed approximately 5 feet off the ground in protected areas with trees and shrubs.

Ingredients

Black oil sunflower, peanuts, white millet, safflower, niger, sunflower chips, raisins, pumpkin seeds, blueberries.

Consumer Guarantee

If you are not satisfied with this product, mail in the original proof of purchase to receive a full refund of your purchase price.

Developed by ornithologists

Thoroughly Researched

Maybe you've looked at generic ordinary bird food in the store and thought, "bird food is bird food, right? What's the difference?" In fact, there's more to creating quality wild bird food than just putting seeds in a bag. Scotts wild bird food is loaded with research, consumer insights, and innovation.

Scotts has ornithologists (or "bird scientists") and field biologists on staff who work to develop the most effective foods for wild birds through rigorous study of bird physiology and behavior. These foods are tested in partnership with leading universities at feeding sites across the country. Over 46,000 feeder visits have been catalogued, analyzed, and evaluated by external statisticians.

Research Makes Blends Better

All food. No fillers. Unlike ordinary wild bird food which is full of filler seeds, Scotts wild bird food contains only the best of what birds love to eat. With Scotts, wild birds easily find the food they want, without the need to pick through and scatter what they don't to the ground. Birds forage for foods that contain the ingredients they desire. By adding specific ingredients, we can make our wild bird foods more attractive to songbirds--and more enjoyable for you.

Choosing a Feeder

There are several styles of feeders to accommodate a variety of landscapes, but most feeders fit into one of the three basic types for feeding wild bird food blends.

Hopper Feeder Platform Feeder Tube Feeder

Four walls
Can take on different designs
Attracts small to large birds (i.e. chickadees and cardinals) depending on perch size

Large surface area
Can accommodate more birds of various sizes
Look for tray feeders with proper drainage to avoid moisture retention

Cylinder shape with ports and perches
Size of ports and perches determines the types of birds
Thistle/finch feeders have short perches and tiny slits for ports

Create a Backyard Habitat for Birds

For many gardeners, having songbirds visit is one of the benefits of having a garden in the first place. It's always a delight to see the variety of birds that drop by for a nibble or a rest. If you want to create a bird-friendly garden, here are a few easy steps you can take to enjoy seeing birds all year long.

Feed Them Well

Birds have simple needs: food, water, shelter, and protection from predators. Naturally, native birds thrive on native plants, so choose a selection of regional beauties that produce seeds, berries, or nectar. Work dead trees or old stumps into your landscape to attract insect-eaters and provide shelter. The more diverse your food supply is, the more variety of birds you'll see in your garden.

Keep Birds Safe and Warm

Birds seek shelter at different heights. You can make your garden more hospitable to them by growing vines, shrubs and trees. Evergreens provide excellent winter shelter, as well as protection from cats and other predators. If you have a dying tree, let it stand, since its cavities make great nesting spots.

Quench Their Thirst

Putting out a birdbath, especially one with a trickle or fountain, makes your garden a very popular spot. If you have a pond or stream, place flat rocks in them for bird perches.

Sit, Watch, and Enjoy

You can lose yourself for hours watching birds fly in to eat or bathe. If you have binoculars, you can see incredible details as they visit. You'll learn a lot, and have a great time.

* Results may vary by region and/or season. When compared to basic wild bird food blends consisting of ingredients such as grain products, white millet, and black oil sunflower.

description:
Wagner's 62008 Western Regional Blend Wild Bird Food, 20-Pound Bag
Wagner’s Western Regional Blend will attract more of the songbirds you want to see by offering more of the seeds backyard birds in your area look for. Blended with black oil sunflower, striped sunflower seed, safflower seed and other select grains, it’s sure to be a hit at the feeder. You’ll be surprised at the types of wild birds you will attract. This blend works well in all types of feeders, by offering your backyard birds a larger quantity of the seeds they enjoy, you will be rewarded with the different types of songbirds that will come to your feeders. Chickadees, Finches and Blue Jays will be frequent visitors to your backyard. Trust your backyard birds to the experts at Wagner’s.
Affresh Washing Machine Cleaner, Cleans Front Load and Top Load Washers, Including HE, 6 Tablets
Affresh® washing machine cleaner deep cleans even where you can’t see to help remove odor-causing residues and build-up that can form in machines over time. Specially formulated to dissolve slowly throughout the entire wash cycle, affresh® washer cleaner is an easy and effective way to clean your washing machine pump and valve, behind the basket and drum, wash tub, agitator or filter, and drain hose. Just drop one tablet in an empty washer and run on a normal hot or Clean Washer cycle for a fresh, clean appliance. Made with U.S. EPA Safer Choice certified ingredients, the time-release tablets are septic safe and can be used with top or front load washing machines, including HE. Use monthly for optimal results.
Affresh Washer Cleaner removes and prevents odor-causing residue that can occur in all washers. While bleach only kills odor-causing bacteria leaving behind the detergent residue, Affresh Washer Cleaner uses surfactant chemistry to remove the root problem. Affresh cleaner is a formulated, slow-dissolve, foaming tablet that gets under residue, breaks it up, and washes it away leaving the washer smelling fresh and clean. Simply place one tablet in the wash basket (without clothes) and run a Normal Cycle (hot option) or Clean Washer Cycle. Affresh brand is safe on septic tanks, and safe for all washer components. Use once a month to keep your machine fresher and cleaner. Package includes six tablets.

description: Includes: one (1) twenty pound / 20 lbs. bag of premium wild bird seed made from non-GMO ingredients. Des Moines Feed Co. Woodpecker Gourmet wild bird seed is one of the first blends—if not the first— formulated especially for woodpeckers. It contains almonds—the woodpeckers' favorite—and other various tree nuts and nutritious highlights: pumpkin seeds and raisins. It is specially formulated to attract Woodpeckers: Pileated woodpeckers, Acorn woodpeckers, Downy woodpeckers, Red-headed, Red-bellied, Yellow-bellied Sapsucker, and Northern Flicker woodpeckers. It will also attract a diverse range of songbirds and other wild bird species: Blue Jay, Cardinal, Tufted Titmouse, and White-breasted Nuthatch. Air-cleaned, Non-GMO Ingredients include: Almonds, Tree Nuts, Peanut Pickouts, Sunflower Hearts, Sunflower Seed, Safflower Seed, Non-GMO Shelled Corn, Pumpkin Seed, Raisins. Guaranteed Analysis: Crude Fat (Min) 33.0%; Crude Fiber (Max) 10.0%; Moisture (Max) 14.0%; Crude Protein (Min) 20.0%. What is Des Moines Feed Co.? Iowa-based, family-owned and managed Des Moines Feed Co. has been in the wild bird feed industry since 1944. For over 70 years, they've produced energy-rich gourmet mixes that include peanut pickouts, peanut hearts, almonds and other tree nuts to meet the unique needs of wild bird species from cardinals to woodpeckers to pigeons and beyond! Their blends of high-quality seeds are cleaned, graded and air-aspirated. No artificial flavoring is used. Their fruit is real fruit. No insecticides, pesticides or heat treatments are used. All seeds and grains are non-GMO and tested in a third-party laboratory for quality control. Des Moines combined experience and expertise in bird feeding and commitment to wild birds high-quality nutrition is encapsulated in their mission, "our business is truly for the birds."

description:
PREMIUM SAFFLOWER SEED

Squirrels do NOT like this delicious seed, but many birds do! If you want to feed birds exclusively, then Safflower should be your seed of choice for backyard feeders.

ALL THAT NATURE INTENDED

Welcome to the fun-filled world of Nature’s Nuts. Enjoying nature is easy with our NUT-TRICIOUS blend of seeds and nuts. We have searched the world over to bring you the freshest natural ingredients for bird and wildlife feeding. It is our belief that nature provides the best solutions for feeding, so you will never find artificial colors, oils or fillers in our seed. Nature’s Nuts has produced and harvested seed for over thirty years and has used this know-how to provide birders and nature enthusiasts with a premium natural choice in wildlife diets.

PREMIUM SAFFLOWER SEED

Ingredients: Premium Safflower Seed.

Attracts: Jays, Cardinals, Robins, and Grosbeaks.

Feeder Type: Hopper, Ground, Bowl, Chalet.

NATURE'S NUTS

To turn your backyard into a miniature nature reserve you must provide plenty of quality food, water, and shelter. With the help of Nature’s Nuts you can provide a haven for wildlife, giving your entire family hours of enjoyment, and a respect for nature that will last a lifetime. For a birds-eye-view, place feeders in an area that is easy to watch and accessible to your backyard friends. Make sure this area is close to a bush or tree so that birds can fly into cover, and look around, before feeding. To attract a variety of birds, we recommend one feeder that is suspended or mounted, coupled with a ground-feeding tray. This will keep competition to a minimum between smaller and larger birds. Above all, be patient. Your birds may take a few weeks to locate a new feeder. But rest assured, once they find it, they will be back for more. Winter creates a special demand for a high-energy diet, while spring and early summer finds seeds and nuts in short supply. So stay stocked for your flock!

description:
Introducing our premium Cardinal Bird Seed, the perfect bird food for cardinals and other wild birds in your backyard. Specially formulated with a blend of safflower seeds, thistle seed, nyjer seed, and sunflower hearts, this cardinal food seed is designed to attract a variety of outside wild birds to your bird feeders. Our bird seed for cardinals is not only nutritious but also squirrel proof, thanks to our hot bird seed formula. Now you can enjoy watching beautiful birds without worrying about unwanted visitors!

Our bird food for outside wild birds is available in various sizes, including a 20 lb bag and a 10 lbs bag, making it suitable for all bird feeder types. With our no mess bird seed, you can keep your bird seed storage container and bird feeder food area clean, ensuring a healthy environment for your feathered friends. Wagners bird seeds for outside wild birds are known for their quality, and our cardinal bird food is no exception. So, whether you are looking for bird suet for outside wild birds or safflower bird seed, our wild bird food for outside feeder is the perfect choice. Order now and bring the beauty of cardinals and other wild birds to your backyard!

Shelled whole peanuts are more nutritious than peanut hearts because the more a seed is chopped or cut, the more surface area exposed to air which cause a loss of nutrients and leads to quicker spoilage.
Super high fat content for quick energy to help birds survive in the wild.
No added synthetics, chemicals, or artificial flavors.
Works well in all feeder types including platform feeders, squirrel feeders, Cole's Terrific TubeTM, Mighty MeshTM, and Bountiful BowlTM.
Both birds and critters eat Raw Peanuts - titmice, nuthatches, jays, chickadees, Pyrrhuloxia, wrens, and woodpeckers. Plus, chipmunks, squirrels and deer!

description:
Wild Delight Deck, Porch N' Patio No Waste Bird Food, 20 lb-(374200),Tan
Wild Delight Deck, Porch N' Patio is an elite, zero-waste wild bird food blended to attract the most desired outdoor pets and give you the cleanest feeding experience available for your outdoor living areas.
Primary Wild Bird Species Attracted: All Songbirds, Cardinals, Grosbeaks, Finches, Jays, Nuthatches and other outdoor pets.
Ingredients: Sunflower Kernels, Peanuts, Pistachios, Hulled Pumpkin Seed, Vitamin A Supplement, Vitamin D-3 Supplement, Vitamin E Supplement, Menadione Sodium Bisulfite Complex, Thiamine Mononitrate, Riboflavin, Niacin, Choline Chloride, Vitamin B12 Supplement, Pyridoxine Hydrochloride, Biotin, Folic Acid, Ascorbic Acid (Vitamin C), L-Lysine Monohydrochloride, DL-Methionine, Potassium Chloride, Sodium Bicarbonate, Manganous Oxide, Ferrous Sulfate, Copper Oxide, Calcium Iodate, Zinc Oxide, Magnesium Oxide, Dextrose, Artificial Flavor.
Wagner's 82072 Gourmet Nut & Fruit Wild Bird Food, 5 Pound (Pack of 1)
Wagner's Nut 'N Fruit Gourmet series blend has been specially created to attract a wide variety of birds to your feeding area. This filler-free food contains all edible, highly nutritious ingredients providing birds the high energy they need. The fruit content of the blend can draw non-seed eating birds adding to your viewing enjoyment. Finally, you will not get shell waste or seed growth which makes this food great for decks, porches and patios.

Keep a variety of different birds well-fed with this 25 pound bag of Safflower Seed. This seed is often used as a substitute for black oil sunflower seed, as it is high in protein and fat. Unlike black oil sunflower seed, this food choice discourages starlings, grackles, and squirrels from dining. It also is a favorite of cardinals, doves, and woodpeckers, inviting a wealth of birds to your garden. Easily fill your tray, hopper, or tube feeders with this Safflower Seed.
This Safflower Seed is packaged in a 25 pound bag for easy handling.
Birds that enjoy this seed: blackbirds, cardinals, chickadees, doves, finches, goldfinches, jays, nuthatches, siskins, titmice, woodpeckers, and wrens
Feeder Options: hopper feeders, tray feeders, and tube feeders

description:
Wagner's 62053 Nyjer Seed Wild Bird Food, 20-Pound Bag
Wagner's Nyjer Seed is the absolute favorite of Finches, such as the American Goldfinch, House Finch, Purple Finch, Pine Siskin and other small songbirds. This tiny delicacy is used in Finch feeders which have smaller holes and tiny perches - perfect for the Finches but discouraging to larger birds. Wagner’s Nyjer Seed is the perfect choice for nurturing Finches with its high fat and protein content. Sometimes referred to as "black gold," nyjer seed may seem more expensive than some premium blends, it actually lasts longer as it packs an incredible 150,000 seeds per pound and the seeds create no waste, no mess, no growth and more visits to your feeder. Fill your Finch feeder with Wagner’s Nyjer Seed and enjoy the antics of these beautiful and sociable birds in your backyard. Trust your backyard birds to the experts at Wagner’s.
Wagner's 57075 Safflower Seed Wild Bird Food, 5-Pound Bag
Wagner's Safflower Seed - Cardinals love it, most squirrels don’t. Wagner's Safflower Seed is a great way to attract the birds you want - Cardinals, Chickadees, Titmice, Grosbeaks - and discourage the "feeder hogs", like Grackles and Starlings, that keep them away. And best of all, squirrels generally don’t like the bitter taste so they will stay away as well. If you have unwanted birds and squirrels crowding out your songbirds we recommend gradually filling your feeder with Wagner’s Safflower Seed for a period of time, then gradually mixing in your favorite Wagner’s Premium Wild Bird Food. Wagner’s Safflower Seed is truly a premium, high value seed not found in ordinary blends. So give the Cardinals their favorite seed and keep the pests away at the same time, with Wagner’s Safflower Seed. Trust your backyard birds to the experts at Wagner’s.

description:
Celebrate woodpeckers in your area by feeding them the Pine Tree Farms Woodpecker Classic Seed Log. This mixture of peanuts, almonds, cracked corn, and sunflower seed offers woodpeckers all their favorite foods in one convenient place. The blend gives birds the nutrients they need to remain active, and its fun log shape makes feeding simple. Place this log into your existing Pine Tree Farms Classic Seed Log Feeder (not included), or rest it on a platform for more options. Gelatin helps the log hold its shape, allowing you to feed birds without the hassle of loose seed. Watch woodpeckers frequent your backyard to feed from this Woodpecker Classic Seed Log. Made in the USA.
This case pack includes 12 Pine Tree Farms Woodpecker Classic Seed Logs, 2.25 lbs. each.
Birds that enjoy this seed log: blackbirds, cardinals, chickadees, crows, doves, finches, flickers, goldfinches, grackles, grosbeaks, jays, juncos, mockingbirds, nuthatches, pheasants, pigeons, quail, redpolls, siskins, sparrows, starlings, titmice, towhees, woodpeckers, and wrens
Feeder Options: seed log feeders, platform, or tray feeders
Ingredients: mixed tree nuts, peanuts, almonds, cracked corn, sunflower hearts, black oil sunflower seed, gelatin
Guaranteed Analysis: minimum crude protein 14%, minimum crude fat 25%, maximum crude fiber 9%, maximum moisture 11%

description:
Wagner's 82056 Gourmet Waste Free Wild Bird Food, 5-Pound Bag
Wagner's Waste Free Gourmet series blend has been specially created to attract a wide variety of birds to your feeding area. This filler-free food contains all edible, highly nutritious ingredients providing birds the high energy they need. The nut and sunflower content of the blend are proven bird favorites and will provide hours of viewing enjoyment. Finally, you will not get shell waste or seed growth which makes this food great for decks, porches and patios.
Wagner's 82072 Gourmet Nut & Fruit Wild Bird Food, 5 Pound (Pack of 1)
Wagner's Nut 'N Fruit Gourmet series blend has been specially created to attract a wide variety of birds to your feeding area. This filler-free food contains all edible, highly nutritious ingredients providing birds the high energy they need. The fruit content of the blend can draw non-seed eating birds adding to your viewing enjoyment. Finally, you will not get shell waste or seed growth which makes this food great for decks, porches and patios.
Wagner's 57075 Safflower Seed Wild Bird Food, 5 Pound (Pack of 1)
Wagner's Safflower Seed - Cardinals love it, most squirrels don’t. Wagner's Safflower Seed is a great way to attract the birds you want - Cardinals, Chickadees, Titmice, Grosbeaks - and discourage the "feeder hogs", like Grackles and Starlings, that keep them away. And best of all, squirrels generally don’t like the bitter taste so they will stay away as well. If you have unwanted birds and squirrels crowding out your songbirds we recommend gradually filling your feeder with Wagner’s Safflower Seed for a period of time, then gradually mixing in your favorite Wagner’s Premium Wild Bird Food. Wagner’s Safflower Seed is truly a premium, high value seed not found in ordinary blends. So give the Cardinals their favorite seed and keep the pests away at the same time, with Wagner’s Safflower Seed. Trust your backyard birds to the experts at Wagner’s.

Wagner's 62032 Cardinal Blend Wild Bird Food, 6-Pound Bag, 2-Pack

description:
Conveniently offer mealworms, nuts, and fruit to your feathered friends using this Pine Tree Farms Mealworm Banquet Seed Cake. Some birds, such as waxwings and warblers, prefer mealworms to traditional seed, and this large cake makes feeding such a treat simple. A gelatin binding keeps the nuts, fruit, and mealworms in this generous, rectangular shape, perfect for placing on a tray or platform feeder. This blend of ingredients provides birds the energy they need to thrive, and the unit may also be placed in a large seed cake feeder. Supply bluebirds and thrushes with mealworms in a new way using this Mealworm Banquet Seed Cake. Made in the USA.
This case pack includes 8 of the Pine Tree Farms Mealworm Banquet Seed Cakes, 1.75 pounds each.
Birds that enjoy this seed cake: bluebirds, jays, kinglets, orioles, robins, tanagers, thrushes, titmice, warblers, and waxwings
