description:
Wagner's 82042 Songbird Banquet Wild Bird Food, 5-Pound Bag
Trust your backyard birds to the experts at Wagner’s. Songbird Banquet is formulated to attract a wide variety of songbirds and keep them coming back to the feeder. Bird favorites-black oil and striped sunflower, peanuts, safflower and tree nuts fill this mix with all natural nutrition. Wagner’s Gourmet series blends contain no fillers. That equals better value for you and healthier food for your wild birds.
Wagner's 82072 Gourmet Nut & Fruit Wild Bird Food, 5 Pound (Pack of 1)
Wagner's Nut 'N Fruit Gourmet series blend has been specially created to attract a wide variety of birds to your feeding area. This filler-free food contains all edible, highly nutritious ingredients providing birds the high energy they need. The fruit content of the blend can draw non-seed eating birds adding to your viewing enjoyment. Finally, you will not get shell waste or seed growth which makes this food great for decks, porches and patios.
Wagner's 13008 Deluxe Wild Bird Food, 10 lb Bag
Wagner’s Deluxe Wild Bird Food Blend with sunflower and general purpose seeds offers the backyard enthusiast a value plus moderately priced food that is the real deal! Deluxe Blend can be used in all types of feeders as well as being a great mix to attract those wonderful ground feeding birds. You’ll get all the regular customers like Cardinals, Chickadees and Finches as well as other indigenous backyard visitors. Trust your backyard birds to the experts at Wagner’s.

description:
Wagner's 82042 Songbird Banquet Wild Bird Food, 5-Pound Bag
Trust your backyard birds to the experts at Wagner’s. Songbird Banquet is formulated to attract a wide variety of songbirds and keep them coming back to the feeder. Bird favorites-black oil and striped sunflower, peanuts, safflower and tree nuts fill this mix with all natural nutrition. Wagner’s Gourmet series blends contain no fillers. That equals better value for you and healthier food for your wild birds.
Wagner's 57075 Safflower Seed Wild Bird Food, 5 Pound (Pack of 1)
Wagner's Safflower Seed - Cardinals love it, most squirrels don’t. Wagner's Safflower Seed is a great way to attract the birds you want - Cardinals, Chickadees, Titmice, Grosbeaks - and discourage the "feeder hogs", like Grackles and Starlings, that keep them away. And best of all, squirrels generally don’t like the bitter taste so they will stay away as well. If you have unwanted birds and squirrels crowding out your songbirds we recommend gradually filling your feeder with Wagner’s Safflower Seed for a period of time, then gradually mixing in your favorite Wagner’s Premium Wild Bird Food. Wagner’s Safflower Seed is truly a premium, high value seed not found in ordinary blends. So give the Cardinals their favorite seed and keep the pests away at the same time, with Wagner’s Safflower Seed. Trust your backyard birds to the experts at Wagner’s.
Wagner's 62032 Cardinal Blend Wild Bird Food, 6-Pound Bag
Wagner's Cardinal blend is formulated to attract Cardinals and other songbirds. A combination of Cardinals’ favorite seeds create this tempting feast - safflower, black oil sunflower and striped sunflower seeds. This mixture of high oil content seeds provides the necessary energy needed to nourish these brilliantly colored birds. An added bonus: squirrels don’t like safflower seeds. The Cardinal is one of America's favorite feeder birds, so enjoy the sights and sounds of the beautiful Cardinals and other songbirds that Wagner’s Cardinal Blend is sure to attract to your backyard. Trust your backyard birds to the experts at Wagner’s.

description:
Wagner's 82056 Gourmet Waste Free Wild Bird Food, 5-Pound Bag
Wagner's Waste Free Gourmet series blend has been specially created to attract a wide variety of birds to your feeding area. This filler-free food contains all edible, highly nutritious ingredients providing birds the high energy they need. The nut and sunflower content of the blend are proven bird favorites and will provide hours of viewing enjoyment. Finally, you will not get shell waste or seed growth which makes this food great for decks, porches and patios.
Wagner's 82072 Gourmet Nut & Fruit Wild Bird Food, 5 Pound (Pack of 1)
Wagner's Nut 'N Fruit Gourmet series blend has been specially created to attract a wide variety of birds to your feeding area. This filler-free food contains all edible, highly nutritious ingredients providing birds the high energy they need. The fruit content of the blend can draw non-seed eating birds adding to your viewing enjoyment. Finally, you will not get shell waste or seed growth which makes this food great for decks, porches and patios.
Wagner's 62067 Deluxe Treat Blend Wild Bird Food, 4 Pound (Pack of 1)
Wagner's Deluxe Treat Wild Bird Food is a deluxe wild bird food with a treat - safflower seed. Wagner’s Deluxe Treat is a quality blend of seeds including black oil sunflower as well as different varieties of safflower seed. This colorful high quality blend will bring all your favorite and beautiful songbirds to your backyard. By offering your backyard birds a larger quantity of the seeds they enjoy, you will be rewarded with many different types of songbirds that will come to your feeders. Cardinals, Chickadees, Titmice, Nuthatches and Jays will be frequent visitors to your backyard. This blend works well in all types of feeders. Trust your backyard birds to the experts at Wagner’s.

Wagner's 62034 Greatest Variety Blend Wild Bird Food, 6-Pound Bag
Wagner's Greatest Variety is our ultimate food for the greatest variety of birds. Just like people, different birds have different food preferences which is why we have included the greatest variety of bird food ingredients in this product. With these 11 carefully selected bird food ingredients, we guarantee that Wagner’s Greatest Variety will attract all your favorite songbirds to your feeder. The black oil sunflower, striped sunflower and sunflower chips, which together represent over 40% of the blend are the top food choice for the greatest number of wild bird species. By offering sunflower seeds in different sizes, both hulled and unhulled, birds of various sizes can find their favorite food. White millet, red millet, cracked corn, and red milo will attract a variety of ground feeders such as Tree Sparrows, Song Sparrows, House Sparrows, Dark-eyed Juncos, and Mourning Doves to your backyard. Nyjer, peanut kernels, canary seed and safflower, will attract specific species of preferred birds ranging from Cardinals, Chickadees and Titmice to Jays, Finches and Woodpeckers. Trust your backyard birds to the experts at Wagner’s.

description:
About this item

Attracts a Variety of Birds: Safflower seeds are known to attract a diverse range of wild birds, including cardinals, chickadees, titmice, and more. Many bird enthusiasts appreciate safflower seeds for the variety of species they can attract to backyard feeders.
High in Nutrition: Safflower seeds are a nutritious option for wild birds, providing essential nutrients such as fats and proteins. These nutrients are crucial for the health and well-being of birds, especially during colder months when food sources may be scarce.
Shell Thickness Deters Pests: Safflower seeds have a thicker shell compared to some other birdseed types. This can be beneficial in deterring pests and preventing the seeds from sprouting and creating unwanted plants around your feeding area.
Ideal for Selective Birds: Some bird species, like cardinals, are known to favor safflower seeds over other options. If you want to attract specific types of birds to your backyard, offering safflower seeds can be a strategic choice.
Unappealing to Squirrels: One notable advantage of safflower seeds is that they are less attractive to squirrels compared to other birdseed varieties. This can help minimize issues with squirrels raiding bird feeders and allows birds to enjoy the seeds without competition.

description:
About this item

Zero Waste Formula - Our innovative blend features only hulled seeds and ready-to-eat ingredients, eliminating scattered shells and unwanted debris from your yard while reducing cleanup time.

description:
Squirrel Buster Standard Squirrel-proof Bird Feeder w/4 Metal Perches, 1.3-pound Seed Capacity, garden green
It is easy to clean and to fill. It is weight adjustable to exclude larger birds, and no tools are required to assemble it. Holds 3/4 quarts of seed.
Squirrel Buster Standard is a squirrel proof wild bird feeder with a lifetime warranty. It is easy to clean and to fill. It is weight adjustable to exclude larger birds, and no tools are required to assemble it. Holds 3/4 quarts of seed.
Wagner's 62032 Cardinal Blend Wild Bird Food, 6-Pound Bag
Wagner's Cardinal blend is formulated to attract Cardinals and other songbirds. A combination of Cardinals’ favorite seeds create this tempting feast - safflower, black oil sunflower and striped sunflower seeds. This mixture of high oil content seeds provides the necessary energy needed to nourish these brilliantly colored birds. An added bonus: squirrels don’t like safflower seeds. The Cardinal is one of America's favorite feeder birds, so enjoy the sights and sounds of the beautiful Cardinals and other songbirds that Wagner’s Cardinal Blend is sure to attract to your backyard. Trust your backyard birds to the experts at Wagner’s.

description:
About this item

Wagner's Backyard Wildlife Food offers black oil sunflower seeds, striped sunflower seeds, whole peanuts, peanut kernels, and whole corn to attract small backyard animals like rabbits, chipmunks and squirrels.
Enjoy feeding squirrels and small critters their own food, diverting them from your bird feeders filled with Wagner’s Safflower Seed.
Made in the USA, Wagner’s Backyard Wildlife Food and Wagner’s Safflower Seed offer premium quality grains and seeds.
Cardinals love Wagner’s Safflower Seed, which also deters feeder hog birds like grackles and starlings.
Wagner’s Safflower Seed keeps most squirrels away with its bitter taste, allowing songbirds like cardinals, chickadees and titmice to enjoy the feeders.

description:
Product Description

Scotts Songbird Selections offer a full line of premium wild bird food products that were developed by ornithologists using only high-quality ingredients and no fillers added. Brings the birds you want…Again and Again!

Amazon.com

Developed by ornithologists after extensive field testing in backyards just like yours, this Scotts Songbird Selections Wild Bird Food Northeastern Bird Blend from Scotts is a distinct combination of high-quality ingredients including regionally preferred seeds, fruits, and nuts that's formulated to attract MORE desirable and locally-unique bird species that inhabit the region. * This blend is designed to attract Purple Finch, Tufted Titmouse, and other unique Northeastern birds.

Tufted Titmouse. Purple Finch.

It's based on the applied science of feeding behavior and bird vision (birds actually find and choose food based on sight rather than taste ), and tested with over 30,000 feeder observations recorded in the Northeast.

The Scotts Northeastern bird blend can be used in hopper, platform, and tube feeders (learn more about types of feeders below). Use in feeders placed approximately 5 feet off the ground in protected areas with trees and shrubs.

Ingredients

Black oil sunflower, niger, white millet, safflower, peanuts, sunflower chips, raisins, pumpkin seeds, cherries.

Consumer Guarantee

If you are not satisfied with this product, mail in the original proof of purchase to receive a full refund of your purchase price.

Developed by ornithologists

Thoroughly Researched

Maybe you've looked at generic ordinary bird food in the store and thought, "bird food is bird food, right? What's the difference?" In fact, there's more to creating quality wild bird food than just putting seeds in a bag. Scotts wild bird food is loaded with research, consumer insights, and innovation.

Scotts has ornithologists (or "bird scientists") and field biologists on staff who work to develop the most effective foods for wild birds through rigorous study of bird physiology and behavior. These foods are tested in partnership with leading universities at feeding sites across the country. Over 46,000 feeder visits have been catalogued, analyzed, and evaluated by external statisticians.

Research Makes Blends Better

All food. No fillers. Unlike ordinary wild bird food which is full of filler seeds, Scotts wild bird food contains only the best of what birds love to eat. With Scotts, wild birds easily find the food they want, without the need to pick through and scatter what they don't to the ground. Birds forage for foods that contain the ingredients they desire. By adding specific ingredients, we can make our wild bird foods more attractive to songbirds--and more enjoyable for you.

Choosing a Feeder

There are several styles of feeders to accommodate a variety of landscapes, but most feeders fit into one of the three basic types for feeding wild bird food blends.

Hopper Feeder Platform Feeder Tube Feeder

Four walls
Can take on different designs
Attracts small to large birds (i.e. chickadees and cardinals) depending on perch size

Large surface area
Can accommodate more birds of various sizes
Look for tray feeders with proper drainage to avoid moisture retention

Cylinder shape with ports and perches
Size of ports and perches determines the types of birds
Thistle/finch feeders have short perches and tiny slits for ports

Tips to Create a Backyard Habitat for Birds

For many gardeners, having songbirds visit is one of the benefits of having a garden in the first place. It's always a delight to see the variety of birds that drop by for a nibble or a rest. If you want to create a bird-friendly garden, here are a few easy steps you can take to enjoy seeing birds all year long.

Feed Them Well

Birds have simple needs: food, water, shelter, and protection from predators. Naturally, native birds thrive on native plants, so choose a selection of regional beauties that produce seeds, berries, or nectar. Work dead trees or old stumps into your landscape to attract insect-eaters and provide shelter. The more diverse your food supply is, the more variety of birds you'll see in your garden.

Keep Birds Safe and Warm

Birds seek shelter at different heights. You can make your garden more hospitable to them by growing vines, shrubs and trees. Evergreens provide excellent winter shelter, as well as protection from cats and other predators. If you have a dying tree, let it stand, since its cavities make great nesting spots.

Quench Their Thirst

Putting out a birdbath, especially one with a trickle or fountain, makes your garden a very popular spot. If you have a pond or stream, place flat rocks in them for bird perches.

Sit, Watch, and Enjoy

You can lose yourself for hours watching birds fly in to eat or bathe. If you have binoculars, you can see incredible details as they visit. You'll learn a lot, and have a great time.

* Results may vary by region and/or season. When compared to basic wild bird food blends consisting of ingredients such as grain products, white millet, and black oil sunflower.

description:
Wagner's 62032 Cardinal Blend Wild Bird Food, 6-Pound Bag
Wagner's Cardinal blend is formulated to attract Cardinals and other songbirds. A combination of Cardinals’ favorite seeds create this tempting feast - safflower, black oil sunflower and striped sunflower seeds. This mixture of high oil content seeds provides the necessary energy needed to nourish these brilliantly colored birds. An added bonus: squirrels don’t like safflower seeds. The Cardinal is one of America's favorite feeder birds, so enjoy the sights and sounds of the beautiful Cardinals and other songbirds that Wagner’s Cardinal Blend is sure to attract to your backyard. Trust your backyard birds to the experts at Wagner’s.

For office and business environments where only the best will do, Cottonelle® is the premium choice. Cottonelle® Professional Standard Roll Toilet Paper offers a soft feel and a quality experience for all of your guests. This superior quality bath tissue is a good choice for upscale restrooms in a variety of environments, including hospitality and guest rooms, restaurants, retail, small businesses and much more. Each white 2-ply bulk toilet paper roll is individually wrapped in attractive packaging, keeping the rolls clean and hygienic. It meets EPA minimum standards and is and Forest Stewardship Council (FSC) certified, so you can feel good about your choice. When you want to give your guests a touch of washroom luxury away from home, choose Cottonelle® Professional Standard Roll Toilet Paper.

description:
Lyric Supreme Wild Bird Seed, Wild Bird Food Mix with Nuts and Sunflower Seeds, 20 lb. Bag
Lyric Supreme is our most popular wild bird food. We selected a wide variety of all natural, tested ingredients to attract feeder birds like finch, clinging birds who like nuts like woodpeckers and nuthatches and ground feeders like doves. We have large seeds like black oil sunflower for cardinals and small seeds like white millet for juncos. Lyric Supreme is the preferred mix of backyard birders for many reasons. Supreme has a wide variety of the finest natural nutrients with hand-crafted quality and is created by long-time bird feeding hobbyists. Try Supreme by Lyric with the finest nutrients, you'll see the difference.
Wagner's 76027 Black Oil Sunflower Wild Bird Food, 25-Pound Bag
Wagner's Four Season Sunflower Seed is 100% black oil sunflower seed. Sunflower seed is the favorite seed of most wild birds. It is high in energy and has a thin shell making it easy for all birds to consume. Use tray feeders or hopper feeders to attract sunflower loving songbirds. Cardinals, Chickadees, Finches, Nuthatches, Woodpeckers and much more. Trust your backyard birds to the experts at Wagner’s.

description: This recipe looks and smells so good that if you’re a human, you might be tempted to eat it! But don’t be fooled: this trail mix is strictly for the birds. We blame the way it looks so good on the familiarity of its ingredients. You see, this delicious, proven recipe features a generous mixture of top-quality nourishment including cherries, cranberries, raisins, pecans, walnuts, pistachios, almonds, peanuts, and more. Because of this, Nutty Berries with Fruit is sure to keep those feathered friends singing and, just as importantly, coming back to your backyard for more! description:
The Silver King Dent Corn, also known as "Wisconsin No. 7", is not to be confused with the hybrid sweet corn of the same name! This early-maturing white dent corn is the leading white variety in the northern Corn Belt, with full-to-the-tip 8-9-inch long ears, very wide 16-a-row kernels, and leafy stalks that make it an excellent variety for silage. This strong grower, developed in 1904, is especially adapted to resist cold weather. White varieties are typically lower in protein and oil and higher in starch than yellow varieties, making them superior for distillation. Like "Bloody Butcher Corn", it can be roasted when young and ground when mature for grits, meal, hominy, and masa.
Also Known As: White Flint Corn, Wisconsin No. 7 Corn, Hickory King White Dent, Dent Corn, Ornamental Corn.
Plant Name: Corn, Silver King Dent
Latin Name: Zea mays
Days to Germinate: 10-14
Days to Harvest: 100
Growth Habit: Upright
USDA Zones: 4-9
Lifespan: Annual
Brand: TomorrowSeeds
Sunlight: Full Sun, Partial Shade
GMO: No
Pollination: Heirloom, Open-Pollinated
Fungicide-Treated Seeds*: No
Seeds Packed For**: 2024
**Seeds are freshly packed for the growing season of the year listed. Seeds are still viable beyond pack date. Store in a cool and dry location such as the refrigerator or basement to best preserve germination rates.

description:
Wagner's 82072 Gourmet Nut & Fruit Wild Bird Food, 5 Pound (Pack of 1)
Wagner's Nut 'N Fruit Gourmet series blend has been specially created to attract a wide variety of birds to your feeding area. This filler-free food contains all edible, highly nutritious ingredients providing birds the high energy they need. The fruit content of the blend can draw non-seed eating birds adding to your viewing enjoyment. Finally, you will not get shell waste or seed growth which makes this food great for decks, porches and patios.
Wagner's 62032 Cardinal Blend Wild Bird Food, 6-Pound Bag
Wagner's Cardinal blend is formulated to attract Cardinals and other songbirds. A combination of Cardinals’ favorite seeds create this tempting feast - safflower, black oil sunflower and striped sunflower seeds. This mixture of high oil content seeds provides the necessary energy needed to nourish these brilliantly colored birds. An added bonus: squirrels don’t like safflower seeds. The Cardinal is one of America's favorite feeder birds, so enjoy the sights and sounds of the beautiful Cardinals and other songbirds that Wagner’s Cardinal Blend is sure to attract to your backyard. Trust your backyard birds to the experts at Wagner’s.
Wagner's 13008 Deluxe Wild Bird Food, 10 lb Bag
Wagner’s Deluxe Wild Bird Food Blend with sunflower and general purpose seeds offers the backyard enthusiast a value plus moderately priced food that is the real deal! Deluxe Blend can be used in all types of feeders as well as being a great mix to attract those wonderful ground feeding birds. You’ll get all the regular customers like Cardinals, Chickadees and Finches as well as other indigenous backyard visitors. Trust your backyard birds to the experts at Wagner’s.

Affresh Washing Machine Cleaner, 6 Month Supply, Cleans Front Load and Top Load Washers, Including HE
Affresh® washing machine cleaner deep cleans even where you can’t see to help remove odor-causing residues and build-up that can form in machines over time. Specially formulated to dissolve slowly throughout the entire wash cycle, affresh® washer cleaner is an easy and effective way to clean your washing machine pump and valve, behind the basket and drum, wash tub, agitator or filter, and drain hose. Just drop one tablet in an empty washer and run on a normal hot or Clean Washer cycle for a fresh, clean appliance. Made with U.S. EPA Safer Choice certified ingredients, the time-release tablets are septic safe and can be used with top or front load washing machines, including HE. Use monthly for optimal results.
Affresh Washer Cleaner removes and prevents odor-causing residue that can occur in all washers. While bleach only kills odor-causing bacteria leaving behind the detergent residue, Affresh Washer Cleaner uses surfactant chemistry to remove the root problem. Affresh cleaner is a formulated, slow-dissolve, foaming tablet that gets under residue, breaks it up, and washes it away leaving the washer smelling fresh and clean. Simply place one tablet in the wash basket (without clothes) and run a Normal Cycle (hot option) or Clean Washer Cycle. Affresh brand is safe on septic tanks, and safe for all washer components. Use once a month to keep your machine fresher and cleaner. Package includes six tablets.

description:
20 Black Oil Sunflower seed balls made in our Pennsylvania workshop with newest seed crop. Seed balls are about 1/2" diameter and average 2-3 seeds per ball, assuring good germination, but not overcrowding and stressing the seedlings. This is a fun and reliable flower for seed bombing and for gardening with kids. Quick to germinate!.
Sunflower
Edible seeds and Supports native bees
Native to much of the United States
Prefers Full Sun and Heavy-Sandy Soils
Medium water requirements
Sow anytime of year
Zones: 3-11
A note about seed balls:
Seed balls protect the seeds from erosion, foraging, and many other factors. This protective property often results in a slower germination cycle. Wildflowers are also highly variable in their germination rates. Please be patient with your seed balls. If you placed them in a suitable location, soil, and climate, when the seeds are ready, they will grow!

Lyric Supreme is our most popular wild bird food. We selected a wide variety of all natural, tested ingredients to attract feeder birds like finch, clinging birds who like nuts like woodpeckers and nuthatches and ground feeders like doves. We have large seeds like black oil sunflower for cardinals and small seeds like white millet for juncos. Lyric Supreme is the preferred mix of backyard birders for many reasons. Supreme has a wide variety of the finest natural nutrients with hand-crafted quality and is created by long-time bird feeding hobbyists. Try Supreme by Lyric with the finest nutrients, you'll see the difference.

description:
Product Description

Scotts Songbird Selections offer a full line of premium wild bird food products that were developed by ornithologists using only high-quality ingredients and no fillers added. Brings the birds you want…Again and Again!

Amazon.com

Developed by ornithologists after extensive field testing in backyards just like yours, this Scotts Songbird Selections Wild Bird Food Southeastern Bird Blend is a distinct combination of high-quality ingredients including regionally preferred seeds, fruits, and nuts that's formulated to attract MORE desirable and locally-unique bird species that inhabit the region. * This blend is designed to attract Red-Bellied Woodpeckers, Carolina Chickadees, and other unique Southeastern birds.

Red-Bellied Woodpecker. Carolina Chickadee.

It's based on the applied science of feeding behavior and bird vision (birds actually find and choose food based on sight rather than taste), and tested with over 30,000 feeder observations recorded in the Southeast.

The Scotts Southeastern bird blend can be used in hopper, platform, and tube feeders (learn more about types of feeders below). Use in feeders placed approximately 5 feet off the ground in protected areas with trees and shrubs.

Ingredients

Black oil sunflower, peanuts, white millet, safflower, niger, sunflower chips, raisins, pumpkin seeds, blueberries.

Consumer Guarantee

If you are not satisfied with this product, mail in the original proof of purchase to receive a full refund of your purchase price.

Developed by ornithologists

Thoroughly Researched

Maybe you've looked at generic ordinary bird food in the store and thought, "bird food is bird food, right? What's the difference?" In fact, there's more to creating quality wild bird food than just putting seeds in a bag. Scotts wild bird food is loaded with research, consumer insights, and innovation.

Scotts has ornithologists (or "bird scientists") and field biologists on staff who work to develop the most effective foods for wild birds through rigorous study of bird physiology and behavior. These foods are tested in partnership with leading universities at feeding sites across the country. Over 46,000 feeder visits have been catalogued, analyzed, and evaluated by external statisticians.

Research Makes Blends Better

All food. No fillers. Unlike ordinary wild bird food which is full of filler seeds, Scotts wild bird food contains only the best of what birds love to eat. With Scotts, wild birds easily find the food they want, without the need to pick through and scatter what they don't to the ground. Birds forage for foods that contain the ingredients they desire. By adding specific ingredients, we can make our wild bird foods more attractive to songbirds--and more enjoyable for you.

Choosing a Feeder

There are several styles of feeders to accommodate a variety of landscapes, but most feeders fit into one of the three basic types for feeding wild bird food blends.

Hopper Feeder Platform Feeder Tube Feeder

Four walls
Can take on different designs
Attracts small to large birds (i.e. chickadees and cardinals) depending on perch size

Large surface area
Can accommodate more birds of various sizes
Look for tray feeders with proper drainage to avoid moisture retention

Cylinder shape with ports and perches
Size of ports and perches determines the types of birds
Thistle/finch feeders have short perches and tiny slits for ports

Create a Backyard Habitat for Birds

For many gardeners, having songbirds visit is one of the benefits of having a garden in the first place. It's always a delight to see the variety of birds that drop by for a nibble or a rest. If you want to create a bird-friendly garden, here are a few easy steps you can take to enjoy seeing birds all year long.

Feed Them Well

Birds have simple needs: food, water, shelter, and protection from predators. Naturally, native birds thrive on native plants, so choose a selection of regional beauties that produce seeds, berries, or nectar. Work dead trees or old stumps into your landscape to attract insect-eaters and provide shelter. The more diverse your food supply is, the more variety of birds you'll see in your garden.

Keep Birds Safe and Warm

Birds seek shelter at different heights. You can make your garden more hospitable to them by growing vines, shrubs and trees. Evergreens provide excellent winter shelter, as well as protection from cats and other predators. If you have a dying tree, let it stand, since its cavities make great nesting spots.

Quench Their Thirst

Putting out a birdbath, especially one with a trickle or fountain, makes your garden a very popular spot. If you have a pond or stream, place flat rocks in them for bird perches.

Sit, Watch, and Enjoy

You can lose yourself for hours watching birds fly in to eat or bathe. If you have binoculars, you can see incredible details as they visit. You'll learn a lot, and have a great time.

* Results may vary by region and/or season. When compared to basic wild bird food blends consisting of ingredients such as grain products, white millet, and black oil sunflower.

For many gardeners, having songbirds visit is one of the benefits of having a garden in the first place. It's always a delight to see the variety of birds that drop by for a nibble or a rest. If you want to create a bird-friendly garden, here are a few easy steps you can take to enjoy seeing birds all year long.

Feed Them Well

Birds have simple needs: food, water, shelter, and protection from predators. Naturally, native birds thrive on native plants, so choose a selection of regional beauties that produce seeds, berries, or nectar. Work dead trees or old stumps into your landscape to attract insect-eaters and provide shelter. The more diverse your food supply is, the more variety of birds you'll see in your garden.

Keep Birds Safe and Warm

Birds seek shelter at different heights. You can make your garden more hospitable to them by growing vines, shrubs and trees. Evergreens provide excellent winter shelter, as well as protection from cats and other predators. If you have a dying tree, let it stand, since its cavities make great nesting spots.

Quench Their Thirst

Putting out a birdbath, especially one with a trickle or fountain, makes your garden a very popular spot. If you have a pond or stream, place flat rocks in them for bird perches.

Sit, Watch, and Enjoy

You can lose yourself for hours watching birds fly in to eat or bathe. If you have binoculars, you can see incredible details as they visit. You'll learn a lot, and have a great time.

* Results may vary by region and/or season. When compared to basic wild bird food blends consisting of ingredients such as grain products, white millet, and black oil sunflower.

description:
FINCHES FAVORITE - WILD BIRD SEED

Attract more finches to your backyard by feeding them the seeds they love best, sunflower chips and nyjer seed.

ALL THAT NATURE INTENDED

Welcome to the fun-filled world of Nature’s Nuts. Enjoying nature is easy with our NUT-TRICIOUS blend of seeds and nuts. We have searched the world over to bring you the freshest natural ingredients for bird and wildlife feeding. It is our belief that nature provides the best solutions for feeding, so you will never find artificial colors, oils or fillers in our seed. Nature’s Nuts has produced and harvested seed for over thirty years and has used this know-how to provide birders and nature enthusiasts with a premium natural choice in wildlife diets.

FINCHES FAVORITE - WILD BIRD SEED

Ingredients: Sunflower Kernels, Nyjer Seed (Guizotia Abyssinica).

Attracts: American Goldfinches, Purple Finches, House Finches, Chickadees, Nuthatches, and Titmice.

Feeder Type: Tube, Nyjer Sock.

NATURE'S NUTS

To turn your backyard into a miniature nature reserve you must provide plenty of quality food, water, and shelter. With the help of Nature’s Nuts you can provide a haven for wildlife, giving your entire family hours of enjoyment, and a respect for nature that will last a lifetime. For a birds-eye-view, place feeders in an area that is easy to watch and accessible to your backyard friends. Make sure this area is close to a bush or tree so that birds can fly into cover, and look around, before feeding. To attract a variety of birds, we recommend one feeder that is suspended or mounted, coupled with a ground-feeding tray. This will keep competition to a minimum between smaller and larger birds. Above all, be patient. Your birds may take a few weeks to locate a new feeder. But rest assured, once they find it, they will be back for more. Winter creates a special demand for a high-energy diet, while spring and early summer finds seeds and nuts in short supply. So stay stocked for your flock!

Wagner's 25-lb bag of 100% black oil sunflower seed attracts the widest variety of birds with its high fat content that provides the energy birds need.

description:
About this item

Rich in Energy: Peanut hearts are packed with essential fats and proteins, offering a high-energy food source that is especially valuable during migration, breeding, and winter months.
Easy to Eat: Without shells, peanut hearts are soft and easy for birds to consume, reducing waste and ensuring even smaller birds can enjoy them.
Nutrient-Dense: They provide vital nutrients like protein, healthy fats, and vitamins that support feather growth, egg production, and overall health.
Attracts a Variety of Species: Peanut hearts appeal to a wide range of birds, including woodpeckers, chickadees, nuthatches, cardinals, and jays, making your backyard a bird-watching haven.
Mess-Free Feeding: Their shell-free nature keeps feeding areas cleaner and reduces the risk of potential rot from leftover hulls.

description:
Wagner's 76027 Black Oil Sunflower Wild Bird Food, 25-Pound Bag
Wagner's Four Season Sunflower Seed is 100% black oil sunflower seed. Sunflower seed is the favorite seed of most wild birds. It is high in energy and has a thin shell making it easy for all birds to consume. Use tray feeders or hopper feeders to attract sunflower loving songbirds. Cardinals, Chickadees, Finches, Nuthatches, Woodpeckers and much more. Trust your backyard birds to the experts at Wagner’s.
Wagner's 62004 Eastern Regional Wild Bird Food, 20-Pound Bag
Wagner’s Eastern Regional Blend will attract more of the songbirds you want to see by offering more of the seeds backyard birds in your area look for. Blended with black oil sunflower, striped sunflower seed, safflower seed and other select grains, it’s sure to be a hit at the feeder. You’ll be surprised at the types of wild birds you will attract. This blend works well in all types of feeders, by offering your backyard birds a larger quantity of the seeds they enjoy, you will be rewarded with the different types of songbirds that will come to your feeders. Cardinals, Chickadees, Finches and Blue Jays will be frequent visitors to your backyard. Trust your backyard birds to the experts at Wagner’s.
Wagner's 57075 Safflower Seed Wild Bird Food, 5 Pound (Pack of 1)
Wagner's Safflower Seed - Cardinals love it, most squirrels don’t. Wagner's Safflower Seed is a great way to attract the birds you want - Cardinals, Chickadees, Titmice, Grosbeaks - and discourage the "feeder hogs", like Grackles and Starlings, that keep them away. And best of all, squirrels generally don’t like the bitter taste so they will stay away as well. If you have unwanted birds and squirrels crowding out your songbirds we recommend gradually filling your feeder with Wagner’s Safflower Seed for a period of time, then gradually mixing in your favorite Wagner’s Premium Wild Bird Food. Wagner’s Safflower Seed is truly a premium, high value seed not found in ordinary blends. So give the Cardinals their favorite seed and keep the pests away at the same time, with Wagner’s Safflower Seed. Trust your backyard birds to the experts at Wagner’s.

description: Attract your favorite critters with our 40 lb Bag of Loose Shelled Wildlife Feed Corn AKA JCs Wildlife Critter Corn. Our Critter Corn is grown in our very own hometown of Evansville, Indiana using great care to ensure that this corn is perfect for your furry friends. The JCs Wildlife Critter Corn attracts a great variety of wildlife to your feeder, including squirrels, deer, turkeys, ducks, woodchucks, foxes, raccoons, crows, hawks, songbirds, and more! Your backyard wildlife will love the sweet treat of corn throughout the year, especially in the colder months. Our loose corn is packaged in sturdy bags which not only keep your corn fresh, but keep moisture from building up and spoiling the feed. Available in 40-pound bags, our feed corn will keep your feeders stocked longer, ensuring that your animals will keep coming back for snacks. Our JCs Wildlife Critter Corn can be offered in tray bird feeders, platform feeders, ground feeders, and even scattered on the ground for your animals. Contains: 1 bag of USA-grown loose shelled corn, weighing 40 lbs.

description:
Prairie’s Choice Cracked Corn is 100% corn. No more. No less. Our non-GMO, gluten-free, antibiotic-free, non-medicated, all-natural corn kernels have been dried and cracked into easy-to-eat and easy-to-digest pieces for chickens, birds, squirrels, chipmunks, rabbits, deer, goats, sheep, and many other furry backyard animal friends.
Ingredients;100% Cracked Corn (Non-GMO)
Analysis
Crude Protein (Min) 6.8%*
Crude Fat (Min) 3%
Crude Fiber (Max) 4%
*Some studies show non-GMO corn has higher protein levels (as high as 8+%) than conventional corn
Directions for Use
This Cracked Corn can be provided as a delicious, extra source of grain to attract wildlife and as a supplement to backyard, adult chickens. It is not a complete feed. It is suggested not to feed at greater than 10% of total diet.

description:
About this item

These natural, unsalted peanuts are still in their shell. Raw peanuts are an excellent way to attract wildlife to your yard. They provide a high-energy food source for squirrels and other outdoor wildlife.
Excellent for Attracting Birds, Squirrels, Deer, Wildlife/Backyard Animals. Ideal for feeding turkeys, deer, squirrels, large birds, or any woodland creature.
These peanuts are high in fat and calories, providing essential energy for birds. Raw peanuts are the same as the ones we feed to wild birds, whether in or out of bird feeders. They are healthy and safe for our feathered friends, especially during winter when natural food is scarce.
Raw and shelled peanuts are a natural choice for serving birds. In the wild, birds would naturally consume peanuts in this form.
Store raw peanuts in a cool, dry, and animal-proof container to maintain freshness and prevent spoilage.

description:
Black Oil Sunflower seed balls made in our Pennsylvania workshop with newest seed crop. Seed balls are about 1/2" diameter and average 2-3 seeds per ball, assuring good germination, but not overcrowding and stressing the seedlings. This is a fun and reliable flower for seed bombing and for gardening with kids. Quick to germinate!.
Sunflower
Edible seeds and Supports native bees
Native to much of the United States
Prefers Full Sun and Heavy-Sandy Soils
Medium water requirements
Sow anytime of year
Zones: 3-11
A note about seed balls:
Seed balls protect the seeds from erosion, foraging, and many other factors. This protective property often results in a slower germination cycle. Wildflowers are also highly variable in their germination rates. Please be patient with your seed balls. If you placed them in a suitable location, soil, and climate, when the seeds are ready, they will grow!

description: Our original name for this Classic Recipe was, “The World’s Best Darn Bag of Bird Food for Feeding Your Favorite Backyard Friends” (or, “TWBDBOBFFFYFBF” for short). We decided that might be a little much, but we still love how it describes this blend! So what makes Backyard Blend so special? Years of testing have produced this gold-standard for everyday bird feeding. Generously packed with Premium Black Oil Sunflower Seed and freshly blended with Premium-Quality Peanuts, this recipe cuts out the corn and is specially infused with crafted scents. All of this is mixed to perfection in order to attract a wide variety of your backyard favorites, and to keep them there year-round. description:
CHUCKANUT SUPER VALUE SQUIRREL & CRITTER - WILDLIFE FOOD

A great value to attract an array of wildlife.

ALL THAT NATURE INTENDED

Squirrels, chipmunks, rabbits, and other small animals are an important part of enjoying any backyard environment. Their energy and crazy antics will give you and your family a daily dose of fun and excitement. CHUCKANUT SUPER VALUE SQUIRREL & CRITTER BLEND is specifically formulated to attract a wide variety of small animals to compliment any backyard. For hours of relaxation and enjoyment encourage these creatures to become regular visitors. CHUCKANUT SUPER VALUE SQUIRREL & CRITTER BLEND makes it easy to show your love of nature by giving these animals what they want and need.

CHUCKANUT SUPER VALUE SQUIRREL & CRITTER - WILDLIFE FOOD

Ingredients: Corn, Sunflower and Peanuts.

Attracts: Squirrels, Chipmunks, Rabbits, Birds and Other Small Animals.

Feeder Type: Chuckanut Squirrel Feeder, Hopper, Chalet, Bowl.

CHUCKANUT PRODUCTS

Place CHUCKANUT SUPER VALUE SQUIRREL & CRITTER BLEND in a place which is easy for you to watch, and accessible to your outdoor pets. The use of a squirrel feeder is recommended. You may also use certain ground feeders or feeder boxes which if set up in an area away from bird feeders will keep your squirrels and chipmunks out of them. Since most wildlife does not hibernate, feeding should continue year-round. Now enjoy watching your backyard become a habitat for all of nature.
